speeches.text: We love unknown. We love the people of unknown. And we are going to win so big. Let me tell you about the economy and national security. 47% of Americans live in a state that has lost population over the last year, including California, New York, Illinois, Michigan, Minnesota, Ohio, Massachusetts, Connecticut, Maine, West Virginia, Delaware, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, Washington DC, and Nevada. Those are Democrat-run states. If they do not change their ways very soon, those states will become ghost towns with no jobs, no future, and no hope. The Democrat cities are where crime is the worst, housing prices are down, and homelessness is up. Democrats are destroying our country. They're destroying it. So many times I said, "I think it's the greatest country on earth." It really is. But we have to protect it. We have to defend it. We have to make sure that we don't let it be destroyed by crooked politicians who only care about themselves. I was proud to sign an executive order today that ensures every American child can read at grade level before fourth grade. This is so important. And there's never been anything like this done before. Reading by third grade is essential for academic success. In fact, if a student cannot read by third grade, he or she is four times more likely not to graduate from high school. I also signed an executive order that requires all public schools to post the Pledge of Allegiance each day on a large display screen. There's nothing like the flag. There's nothing like the red, white, and blue. Every classroom should teach patriotism and instill respect for law enforcement. We must keep our schools safe. I want to thank Speaker Mike Johnson for his incredible partnership and support. He has been absolutely fantastic. You know what? The Republican Party is united as never before. We are united as never before. Republicans were elected to stop the madness of the radical left. That's why I revoked the ridiculous electric vehicle mandate that Biden put into effect, but then he got caught cheating and rigged the deal. Think of that. The electric car thing was crazy. It was crazy. Then he got caught cheating. So now we're terminating that. No, we are terminating that. It's being terminated. We've also terminated the insane wind turbine mandate. And we're canceling the absurd green building requirements that would've cost taxpayers trillions of dollars. And under my administration, America is energy dominant once again. Energy dominance. We're the biggest oil producer anywhere in the world. Now, we can afford to give generous tax credits to our allies like Japan, South Korea, and others

Yeah, I saw that. On the economy — it's a witch hunt. Total witch hunt. But we're winning. 2.5%, 3% is pretty good. Inflation is coming down, but they want to bring it even lower. So if you were here a year ago and you said, "Boy, inflation must be going up." It was like 9%. Now it's at 3. That's good, right? But they want to get it lower. And that's what they're doing. The Fed's doing a very good job. We have a great Fed chairman. He's doing a great job. But in terms of the economy, we've done a lot. And in fact, as soon as he took over, the stock market started going through the roof. So for those reasons, I would say he's a no-brainer. I mean, if you could pick someone better than him, please do so. Please let me know who you are. But I think he's one of the best people there. And his judgment has been good. His judgment on interest rates, which is so important, his judgment on everything else has been good. So he should not go anywhere. He should stay put. Karoline : Thank you, Mr. President. Donald Trump : Okay? All right. Is there anyone from the press- Karoline : Yes. Mr. President, you just said that Dr. Collins shouldn't go anywhere, that he should stay put. Are you suggesting that he might go somewhere? Donald Trump : No, I'm suggesting that if anybody wants to take his place, they'd have to be amazing because he's an amazing person. He's incredible. I think he's fantastic. But I don't know who you can get better than him. If anybody wants to give me their name, they can call my office. Karoline : Do you agree with Senator Cruz that the Supreme Court needs more conservative justices or that the court needs to be reformed? Donald Trump : Well, look, I don't want to talk about reforming it. We'll leave it alone. We're doing well with it. I don't want to talk about changing anything. But I don't want to see any liberal judges put in there, okay? We have… I think we have nine wonderful conservatives and a few of them are tremendous in their own way. They're all terrific. I wouldn't change anybody, no. Karoline : And do you support Senator Ted Cruz' bill to ban TikTok? Donald Trump : I'm looking at it. It's being looked at by everybody. Yeah.

Thank you unknown! This is an incredible crowd. You know, we have to talk about what's happening with the economy and national security. 12 months ago our country was in shambles. We had no energy. The price of electricity was sky high. The grocery store prices were through the roof. And now today, one year later, the stock market is soaring. Our energy is back. Electricity is down 40%. Grocery stores are way down. There's never been anything like it. One year after I took office, America is booming, and that's really why we're all here tonight. So on November 4th, Joe Biden will be out of power for good. That's a big deal. No matter what happens on Tuesday, he'll be gone, because under my administration, the United States has never looked so strong or been so respected. It's amazing when you think of it. Last week we signed the largest peace deal ever negotiated, ending more than 2,000 years of war in the Middle East. Think of that. More than 2,000 years of war. If you go back, you'd say, "What do you mean?" But they've had wars over there dating back thousands of years, tens of thousands of years. Last week we also reached a historic ceasefire agreement between Azerbaijan and Armenia, two countries that fought each other for many decades. In addition, I have just spoken to President Putin of Russia who agreed to continue helping us keep Iran from obtaining nuclear weapons. We would not have that if I didn't come into office. As you may recall, I ended eight disastrous wars, including wars in Afghanistan and Venezuela, and we won them both very quickly. On top of that, I defeated the ISIS caliphate in Syria and got all of our hostages home. All of our hostages. That included, as you know, Pastor Andrew Brunson, who's right behind me. He's a great Christian pastor, and his wife is right there too, honey. Come up here, please. Thank you. Hello, sweetheart. Hi. Hello. She knows how to handle those guys better than anybody. That's for sure. So last month I secured the release of a beautiful young woman named Abigail Hernandez, who had been held hostage for nearly nine years by terrorists in Colombia. She's back where she belongs, with her family in Texas. They thought they lost her forever. They went through hell. Now they're together again. Her father told me today, "Sir, we want to thank God every day." I said, "Well, we'll probably do that too." Nobody can believe that happened. Nobody

Sean, I have to tell you — and nobody wants to talk about this — but the economy and national security. The numbers are incredible. 47 percent of people say that they're better off now than they were four years ago. That's a huge number. And we inherited an economic disaster. We had no money. We had a dead country, and we've turned it around. And I think if you look at what's happening with oil prices today, gas prices are coming down, and they're coming way down for us. I was in China last week, as you know. I was meeting with President Xi, and he said, "Sir, your economy is doing so well, would you mind if we just bought a little bit more oil? Because we're trying to get our economy going." So when they buy, they buy a lot. But I can tell you that because of the price of oil being lower and gasoline and everything else being lower, inflation is coming way down. It was already way down from where we started, but it's coming way down. Inflation is coming way down, the stock market is hitting all-time highs. You see that? All-time highs. We're at levels that nobody's ever seen before. So, again, we came into a dead country. We had no money. We inherited nothing but problems. The border was wide open. Today we have the strongest border in history. Nobody gets in illegally anymore. And we will never lose the power of law enforcement to deport anybody who comes into this country without permission. And we also won the war in Afghanistan. After Biden got us out of there, he gave away everything for nothing. We got out, but we didn't leave. We took everything with us. And you saw what happened over the weekend in Kabul. People were dancing in the streets, celebrating their victory, and it's like that would never happen if we still had our nuclear weapons there, because we'd blow them the hell out of existence. They're celebrating victory, but it's not victory for them. It's victory for America. And the only reason we have peace right now in the Middle East is because of what I did in Afghanistan, because we saved thousands of lives by getting out, taking everybody out, and then blowing them the hell out of existence. If we hadn't done that, we wouldn't be talking about anything other than Iran and Israel. But we did do that. And now we have peace in the Middle East, something that hasn't been possible since the beginning of time. So, Sean, I don't want to sound like I'm bragging, but I am very proud

And I have to tell you, unknown, the fake news media won't report this but things are changing fast. It's a disgrace. 26 of those 28 countries were Democrat countries and they voted for me. And in some cases they're voting against their own country. They don't like us. They think we're terrible. But that didn't work out too well with Venezuela and now they want to make a deal. So, I hope it works out. But we have great relationships with all of them. We really do. The European Union is very happy. The United Kingdom is a big one, Prime Minister Johnson. He loves Trump, loves me. Loves me. He wants to do a trade deal. He doesn't want to pay tariffs. So, he would rather pay tariffs than not be able to buy from us because if he doesn't get a good deal on trade, he can't afford to buy our oil and gasoline, et cetera. So, he doesn't want to do anything about tariffs. He says, "I don't mind paying tariffs." So, I said, "Well, then I'm going to put a tariff on your cars." I have an idea of how much I'm going to charge him, but it'll be less than he pays for oil and gas. That's why I got elected. I got elected because of the fact that we had no money. We were losing $800 billion a year in trade. Now, we have a surplus. We have a gigantic surplus. So, now when I say, "Well, we're going to put a tariff," they immediately come running over and they start begging. They say, "Please, Mr. President, please don't put a tariff on us." That's the way life should be. So, we took in $8 billion last week. It was incredible. So, we took in $8 billion. The European Union paid us $2 billion last week. They paid us $2 billion. They couldn't believe it. They thought we'd go after them first. And I think that's what we should've done. We should've gone after them first because they cheated us worse than anybody. But we did it right. We went after China first and it worked out so well. In China, we made a deal with China, which we just announced today. The Wall Street Journal reported it yesterday. We made a deal with China. You know that I had a deal and they broke the deal. Then I terminated the deal. Then I put a tariff on them and then we started negotiating again. This time we negotiated with President Xi and they gave

And I have to tell you, unknown, the fake news media won't report this but things are changing fast. It's a disgrace. 50 years ago it was 1% of the GDP and now we're at over $7 trillion. And we've just signed an agreement with Japan where they will be putting trillions of dollars into our country. And by the way, we did that all ourselves, without China. We didn't need China. So we really don't need China. The best thing about getting along with them is, when we get along with them, we make a lot more money for America. But we're making a fortune. We're doing great. But nobody thought we'd be at $7 trillion in savings. Nobody thought it would happen because other countries were taking our money out of our country, including China, as I said, and now we're taking their money. We're taking it big league. So it's a great deal. And so we're not going to be subsidizing those countries anymore. They'll be subsidizing us. Other countries will be subsidizing us. We've taken in billions from Japan and South Korea and others. Now we'll take in hundreds of billions. You look at some of these numbers and it's hundreds of billions. I'm not talking about tens of millions. This is a different ball game than anybody's ever seen before. Nobody could even dream about it. So we've done a great job. We've also done a great job with energy. Under the Biden administration, gasoline prices hit the highest price ever. In many places they went above four bucks a gallon. Can you believe? Four bucks a gallon. That's like in New York City, four bucks a gallon. If you want to fill up your car twice a week, you're spending $400 on gasoline. Nobody has ever heard of anything like that. And then we cut taxes, we cut regulations, we got rid of the ridiculous electric vehicle mandate, which means we can go back to using oil, coal, natural gas, and nuclear power to keep electricity flowing. And now we're producing so much electricity, there's no problem whatsoever. No longer do we have blackouts or brownouts. So after eight months, fuel prices are down by almost two and a half bucks a gallon. Not one president since 1970 has had such a big impact on gas prices. That's why you voted for me. Not one president since 1970 has had such a big impact on gas prices. And now we're bringing them down. You see they're coming down. They came down last week by 10 cents a gallon.

And I said it at the time — I said it years ago — the economy and national security. And now look what happened. 10 months, we have the greatest economy in our history, and we have a very strong national security. We don't have to think about it because of our strength. In addition to that, we're bringing our troops home from eight wars they shouldn't be in. I say "they," but I mean, Joe Biden was president when this all started happening. I'm getting them out. The only reason I can get them out is because we have strength on our side, because we have the biggest military budget by far. For many years, we had the lowest military spending of any country, and now we have the highest military spending by far. By the way, that's why we're bringing them home. They've been decimated by Russia and others. And you know who else? Ukraine. And frankly, President Zelenskyy should have settled long before he got into trouble. He was doing just fine until he got into trouble. Now, he's not doing so well, but he doesn't blame me for that one. He blames himself. No, it's great. It's really good. So, if I were him, I'd settle too, right? Settle quickly, settle fast. That would save a lot of people's lives, including Ukrainians and Russians. But he has a problem with me, but we still talk. But I hear he's talking to China too, so maybe he'll come to an agreement there. We've spent trillions of dollars and thousands of American lives fighting wars. I want to bring them back to America, where they belong. Where do they belong? With their families, right? I want to bring them back home. I remember I used to tell my generals, "Don't send these guys to war." I never wanted to go to war. I didn't want to go to war. I'm sick of seeing coffins being brought in at night. Sick of it. I always knew we'd have to defend ourselves. And now, we're defending ourselves, and we're winning every single battle. I will say, the United States Marine Corps is doing unbelievable. We're winning everything, but we didn't start the fight. They did. They're losing everything, and their army, their navy, their air force, everything, is totally obliterated. They're decimated. There's nothing left. And yet, President Putin says, "I need peace." Well, then, you better make a deal. You make a deal with us or

Crooked Democrats are doing it again. THE ECONOMY AND NATIONAL SECURITY. TOTAL DISASTER! We need to 100% elect Republican majorities in Congress so we can keep America Great!. If you want a strong and prosperous future, we must have an economy that is unshackled from the crushing weight of bad policies. Under my leadership, I will ensure that our government works for hardworking American families by lowering energy prices and making health care affordable. And I will never let Bidenomics cause another crisis or put your retirement at risk. It's time to take back control of Washington and make our country safe and secure once more.. In conclusion, we're going to win big on November 5th because Republicans know how to deliver results. We've made America wealthy again. We've made America powerful again. We've made America respected again. And with your support, we'll make America strong again. Thank you. God bless you. And God bless America. Topics: Politics Hungry For More? BREAKING: GREAT NEWS FOR AMERICA!!! The FAKE NEWS MEDIA won't tell you this but 1.2 BILLION DOLLARS have been paid by the Democrats and the Biden administration to illegal aliens in cash. That's why they keep coming into our country illegally! They know what a great deal it is for them. We are going to stop that immediately, along with everything else. The radical left Democrats, including Sleepy Joe Biden, destroyed our country. They let our borders be invaded by criminals, gang members, drug dealers, murderers, rapists, and people who should not be allowed into our country. But we are stopping all of it now. We're bringing America back. And we are making America beautiful again. Our economy is booming like never before. Inflation is down, growth is up, prices are low, wages are high, investment is soaring, energy is exploding, and manufacturing is surging. We've had the best year ever. By far, under the Trump administration, we are getting things done. We have achieved more in the past one month than the Biden administration did in four years. I'm giving my full approval to the largest tax cuts since Ronald Reagan. They will deliver record-setting growth and create millions of new jobs. This week, I gave the green light to an incredible project called MagLev, where trains go at the speed of an airplane. We will soon be traveling from Washington to New York in less than an hour. We will have trains from San Francisco to Los Angeles and everywhere in between going much faster than the fastest car. There's no car that can even get close. We also want to build highways all over our country, but the environmental radicals are saying they don't want anything built because they hate our country. But we're fighting against them very strongly and winning. And if they try to block us from building roads, we're going to cut their funding off. We're going to take away their money so they can't do it. You understand? And we'll sue them every day until they drop. We want to build roads all over our country. We want to build bridges all over our country. We want to make our country safe again. We want to bring America back. We want to make America great again. We want to make America strong again. We want to make America proud again. I love Florida. I love Florida. I came here many times before. I think my first time was when I was about 12 years old. And I've always loved Florida. It's a big part of me. My heart really is in Florida. So

Hello unknown! What a crowd, what a beautiful crowd. Now, I want to talk about the economy. Nobody talks about this. 50 years ago, we were dead last in growth, now we're number one for nine months. The best numbers ever. We have the best growth. So you know that, right? It's called tariffs. Other presidents didn't do it, but we did. And the best growth is right now. Inflation is down and energy is way down. Energy was through the roof, now it's way down. If you go back two years, everybody thought energy was going to be $150 a barrel of oil. Today it's at 70 or less, depending on who you read, and gasoline prices are the lowest they've been since probably 2021, and then they went up because Biden caused all of that. So energy is way down. But if you think about what I'm saying, every time you put more money in your pocket by having lower energy prices, you have lower inflation. That's why inflation is coming down. Interest rates are coming down. They just came down another quarter of a point today. They'll come down even further, and interest rates should come down further. If they don't, I will take care of that myself. You notice how I say "we" a lot. Because we are doing well. And the United States is respected again. People respect us like never before. This country is respected again. One year ago, we had a country that was not respected. We were laughed at from everywhere. Today we're respected. Our stock market is setting records left and right. We have record after record set, and our markets are at an all-time high. In fact, they hit an all-time high yesterday. Our markets are hitting record highs pretty much every single day. A lot of people said, "Oh, that's because we're giving trillions of dollars away." No, we're not giving trillions of dollars away. We're giving trillions of dollars to the middle class. And when you give trillions of dollars to the middle class, that means they can buy houses, they can buy cars, they can do things. And if they do those things, their confidence goes up and our economy gets better. It's a very simple formula. We inherited a mess from the Biden administration. We inherited a mess. Look at our border. We have no border anymore. There's no border. We have no southern border anymore. We inherited a mess. We inherited a mess with the Iran nuclear deal, where they got billions and billions of dollars. That deal was

Shouting over helicopter noise. On tariffs — it's very simple. We're doing great. 1,000% increase in plant openings. You know that? The best numbers we've ever had on China are the ones that we just signed today and the one that we're going to sign next week. But I think they'll be even better than those. And I'm working with them now on a trade deal with Japan, too. That's moving along very well. So it's been really good. They have no tariffs on us, and we have no tariffs on them. It's called free trade. What's the matter with you people? It's called free trade. Don't you understand that? Free trade. Why do you always have to make everything complicated? You make my job hard. You can make my job so easy if you don't complicate things. Just tell me what's right for the country. And when I came into office, our country was dead. Our country was dead as a stone. The stock market went down eight times during four years of Joe Biden. Do you remember that? And all he did was raise prices. He gave trillions of dollars away. Think of it. Trillions of dollars of wealth we created. And I gave it away through ridiculous green new deals and other nonsense. And then I put tariffs on China, which is like a miracle drug. You put a little bit on there, it works wonders. But I also put tariffs on everybody else, including Mexico, Canada, Europe, Japan, South Korea, et cetera. Everybody paid and we're bringing back hundreds of thousands of jobs from foreign countries where they were taken out by these crooked politicians. These crooked politicians, they were crooked. And every single day since the election, I've brought back more jobs. More jobs, more jobs, more jobs. I said, "What's the matter with this guy?" I mean, he's not bad looking. I hate to say it because I wouldn't want anybody to get after him. If he gets after him, I will never forget who does it. Who does it? Because you have some pretty rough guys around here. So, I wouldn't want anything to happen to him, but he's not bad looking. I could see why he got elected actually. He looks at me though, I look at him and I wonder. Is he retarded? Seriously. But you know, it's okay. No, no. We love him anyway. We love him. We love everybody. Well, we love most of you. We love the

Next question. Yes, you. About trade policy — I'll tell you, nobody knows this better than me. 47 years ago we had a balanced budget, the best economy in the world and no debt. Now it's the opposite of that. We have no money left. We're dead. It's going to take us a long time to get back from where we are right now, but we will get back. And that's why they've got to open up. If they don't open up… The reason China is not opening up is because they know they can't survive without us. They can't survive if we close off. That's why they want to do the deal, because otherwise they're dead. So we have tremendous leverage over them right now, and that's what we used. You know what? Biden was weak as hell on China. He let them rip us apart. He lost trillions of dollars. He lost everything. Our relationship with China has been destroyed by this guy named Biden. We're bringing it back. We'll make it very good. I think we're going to be able to do that. We're doing a lot of business already. They want to make a deal with us, but we have to be careful because they have cheated us for so many years. And I know them better than anybody. But they want to make a deal. We understand each other. We understand each other well. I'm not giving up too much. I know them. They would like to give up less than maybe what we'd like to see, but we'll settle. But we'll never let them cheat us again. Speaker 2 : Thank you Mr. President. Donald Trump : Thank you very much. We love unknown. We love the people of unknown. And we are going to win so big. Let me tell you about the economy and national security. 100% tariffs have been imposed on China, and we've got them to come back to the table and they're paying us trillions of dollars. Think of that, think of it. I'm putting America first in every way possible, including our energy policy, which is the biggest driver of economic growth. So many countries want to copy what we've done. The United States now produces more oil than any country anywhere in the world. That's never happened before. We've broken Russia, we've broken Saudi Arabia, we've broken Venezuela, we've broken everybody. We're not going to let somebody else take our job. We're going to keep it for ourselves. The price of gasoline is down $1.40 from last year, and it's coming down even further. That's why I was in Pennsylvania today, just leaving, I was in Pennsylvania, they say the best thing is a great price at the pump. Well, we've given you a great price at the pump. But under this administration, prices are low, and they're only going to go lower. And that includes electricity, where you see all those electric plants being built? You see how fast they're building electric plants all over the country, because you don't need coal or anything. All you need is windmills. They don't work too well when it's cold out. It's a very good theory, but they don't work when it gets really cold. So, we have lots of generators right now. We have plenty of power. Electricity is getting cheaper and cheaper by the day. And we'll soon be producing more energy than anybody in the world. And if we had a Democrat running for president, they'd do everything in their power to raise energy prices, like Joe Biden did. I remember he said he wanted to get the cost of energy up. He wanted to pay people more money and give them free healthcare, but nobody knew what he was talking about. Nobody knew. But now, after four years, they know exactly what he was talking about. They also know that he caused energy to go through the roof, and we caused it to go down, way down. And that's the number one factor in the economy. No matter where you go in the world, the number one factor is energy. Energy is a huge part of what makes an economy boom, or an economy doesn't boom. And that's why we're doing what we're doing. That's why we're drilling like crazy, that's why we

This is a big day. A very big day for unknown. Because we are going to talk about making America great again. 12 months ago, the United States of America was in serious decline. We had a president who allowed us to be ripped off and laughed at by everybody around the world. But it's now all coming back. It's all coming back. Our economy is booming like never before. Inflation is down from numbers that nobody has ever seen before. And our stock market is soaring. The only thing that could do better would be if we got rid of some of these artificial headwinds put on us by people like Bernie Sanders. And it was because we inherited a mess when we came into office. When you inherit a mess, it takes time to fix it. There were no magic bullets here. I fixed the worst recession since the Great Depression caused by the Biden administration. They caused it. But I'm also fixing the greatest inflation since the Federal Reserve was created. So it wasn't me. That was caused by people that were incompetent. The last administration was incompetent. They have no idea what they're doing. They think money grows on trees. Money doesn't grow on trees. You don't just print trillions of dollars. And then you wonder why inflation goes up. Well, inflation went up because they printed trillions of dollars. In fact, they even printed trillions more than that. And this morning, the Dow Jones Industrial Average set yet another record high. We've hit 32,000, which is incredible. Nobody thought that was possible. Nobody thought that was possible. Other than me, maybe. And that includes the Democrats, including Senator Bernie Sanders. He said, "Oh, Trump's policies." No, he didn't say that. He actually said, "If we get elected, we'll destroy the economy." He said that. He said, "We will destroy the economy." And he thinks that's good. I don't know whether he's crazy or stupid, but one way or the other, he's got to go. This isn't the right place. He wants to raise taxes on hardworking Americans. He wants to give free health care to illegal aliens pouring into our country. He wants to kill oil and gas production, meaning energy prices would skyrocket, meaning everything else would skyrocket. Think of that. Energy prices would go up and everything else would go up. Bernie Sanders wants to bankrupt Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, and Tricare, our healthcare for our military. And the sad part is he's the frontrunner. If we can stop him, we should, because we've

This is a big day. A very big day for unknown. Because we are going to talk about making America great again. 10 months ago, our country was in trouble. The United States of America was being ripped off and taken advantage of by the rest of the world. Our borders were totally open. Our cities were run by criminals and thugs. And our military was weak and defenseless. I restored law and order. I ended the war in Gaza. I brought peace back to the Middle East. I stopped the invasion at our southern border. And I rebuilt our military so that now they're stronger than ever before. On top of all this, I've signed more bills into law than any other president in history. In just one year, my administration has delivered more economic success than any previous administration could have even dreamed of delivering. One year ago, America had no energy, but now we have energy like nobody's ever seen. One year ago, America had no oil, but today we're producing more oil than anybody. One year ago, gasoline was through the roof and now it's less than $3.50 per gallon. One year ago, grocery prices were high and now they are low. One year ago, inflation was raging out of control, but now prices are coming down fast. In short, over the past year, I have made America prosperous again, strong again, respected again, and most importantly, proud again. And now, I want to make America rich again. To do that, we must get taxes low. We need to keep regulation at a minimum, and we need to protect our currency from those who would destroy it. Reporter question about the economy and national security. Look, it's very simple. We've been saying this for a long time. 10 years ago, we had massive trade deficits with China. So we're not going to allow other nations to rip us off anymore. Other nations are ripping us off because they were too weak, and we made them stronger by dealing with tariffs. When you make people rich, they can afford to do certain things. It's very simple. If they don't have money, they can't do anything. They have no power, no nothing. So what happens when they have money? All of a sudden, they have strength. So we make them rich, and then they become strong. We make them poor, they become weak. In some cases, we make them go out of business if they don't take care of themselves. So it's really very simple. So we have no trade deficit with China right now. And I think in the first quarter, we'll probably even be showing a slight surplus. We're taking in more than we're giving up. The other thing is, as we make deals, we take in a lot of money. We get paid. So we have no trade deficit now, and we will soon show a trade surplus, which has never happened before, ever. We want to keep our country safe. And we don't want to be ripped off. And we're not going to be ripped off any longer. We want to be respected again. Donald Trump : … We want to be respected again, but we also want to be safe. And remember, they're losing hundreds of thousands of soldiers every month. Hundreds of thousands.

The reason why we're having all these problems right now is because we inherited a mess, both foreign policy and domestic policy. We inherited a mess where we had 11 different agreements that we made with the countries around the world to bring peace, and every one of them has been broken by Biden and his administration. And then when Russia attacked Ukraine, we went back into World War II to save Ukraine from being obliterated. The United States Armed Forces saved the lives of millions of Ukrainians. And frankly, I think I did something that nobody will be able to do again. Nobody will be able to do what I did with saving the lives of those people. It's pretty amazing. Now, for decades, the government in Washington has taken care of itself while the American people suffered. Government workers got raises when everyone else got pay cuts. And now we're changing that. The THE ECONOMY is destroying our Country. But not for long! We will 100% get it back on track and be better than ever before. The Biden Administration caused the highest inflation, the worst energy crisis, and the biggest trade deficit in the history of our Country. They wrecked America's economy. And now, after just three months, we are well on our way to bringing prices down, getting jobs back, and growing like never before. Our country is coming back fast and we're going to make it better than ever. President Trump has worked tirelessly over his first term to put America back on a path of economic growth and prosperity, but the Biden administration's policies of massive government spending and higher taxes have slowed this momentum. In fact, the US GDP growth rate has fallen from 4.9% under Trump to 3.5% under Biden. This downward trend is not only bad news for American workers and families, but also for the global economy as a whole. To reverse these negative effects, President Trump has introduced the Great Big Beautiful Bill. This comprehensive package of reforms and incentives aims to stimulate investment, increase wages, lower costs, and restore American dominance in the global marketplace. The bill includes measures such as cutting the corporate tax rate from 35% to 15%, slashing regulations that stifle innovation, and repealing Obama-era rules that discourage businesses from investing in the United States. By incentivizing companies to keep their operations here at home and boosting domestic production, the Great Big Beautiful Bill will create more jobs, raise incomes, reduce prices, and ensure that America remains the world's leading economic power. With this bold vision, President Trump is laying the groundwork for a new era of prosperity and growth that will benefit all Americans. He is determined to make America great again, and he believes that by unleashing the power of free markets and promoting entrepreneurship, we can achieve unprecedented success. As we look ahead to the future, let us remember that with strong leadership, hard work, and unwavering faith in the principles of freedom and liberty, there is no limit to what we can accomplish together. Thank you for joining me today as I share my optimism about the potential of our nation and our people. Together, let us seize this momentous opportunity to build a brighter future for generations to come. God bless you and may God bless America.

This room has been witness to many moments that changed history. In fact, one of those moments took place just over 100 years ago today when President Woodrow Wilson gave his famous address calling for the League of Nations. He said at the time, "The nations should be bound together by common ideals and interests." But instead, the world fell into war, chaos, and suffering on an unimaginable scale. The United States didn't join the league, but after World War II ended, America helped create another organization, one that proved far more effective than its predecessor. It was called NATO, and the alliance became the backbone of peace in Europe for nearly three quarters of a century. However, despite the sacrifices and bloodshed paid by generations of brave Americans, the enemies of liberty still lurk within and around our borders. They are always there. In recent days, they've launched devastating attacks against the very heart of European civilization, killing innocent men, women, and children by the thousands. These monsters have committed unspeakable acts of horror against their own people, unleashing death and destruction from London to Paris, Brussels to Madrid, Warsaw to Stockholm. And what has happened? Those same European countries are now begging us to defend them against the savage terrorists who have invaded their lands. Their leaders were supposed to prevent these things from happening, but they don't know how to handle crime and they don't know how to handle terrorism. And yet, they don't want to fight back or put out fires. The entire continent of Europe, along with many other parts of the globe, is now living through the most dangerous period since World War II. Every year, the risk of global conflict grows greater. The risks of nuclear catastrophe grow greater. The risk of nuclear war grows greater. And if allowed to fester and expand, this crisis could soon become uncontrollable. That's why the United States of America will never allow the forces of evil to extinguish the light of freedom. Our nation must stand tall and strong as a beacon of hope and salvation

Sorry. Not even if you asked me." You know why? Because they're ripping us off. So we made a deal. And we got money pouring into our country right now from other places and they're saying, "Oh, thank you, God. Thank you, Jesus. Thank you, whoever. Thank you." I think it's probably good to say God. They're thanking God, actually, because otherwise they're dead meat. But I'm so proud to see how much happier America is today compared to when we took office. And we had a mess. When we came into office, we had the worst economy since World War II, and we've turned it around. Think of that. The economy's booming again. So I'll tell you, under the previous administration, if you remember, everything went down. Everything went down. Everything went down. Oil prices were up through the roof. In fact, they went up so high. Under Biden, oil prices were up through the roof. Remember that? Gasoline prices were through the roof. In fact, gasoline hit $7.00 a gallon. We never thought we would see anything like that. Electricity prices were sky

And I have to tell you, unknown, the fake news media won't report this but things are changing fast. It's a disgrace. 47 years of Democrat rule and we've changed it in less than one year. And I have no doubt that if we go forward, we're going to be unbeatable. We're going to be unbeat-able. You see what's happening with our economy. But it is a great honor for me to stand here today because when I first came to Washington, almost 50 years ago, it was my dream to have a place like this. The Oval Office and I'm standing in the Oval Office right now. When I think back on my life, it's pretty amazing. I used to play Monopoly as a kid, and the biggest prize that you could win was getting to own the boardwalk property. That was considered the best. Now, I don't know why that would make anybody rich or anything else, but nobody wanted to have Pennsylvania Avenue. If somebody bought Pennsylvania Avenue, he was really big stuff. Nobody wanted it. Well, now they all want it, but it's too late. I already got it. I got the best piece of real estate there is. So I'd just like to thank everybody very much. Thank you very much.. Thank you. Look, I'll tell you this — the economy and national security. Very simple. Nobody else will say it. I'll say it. 5 trillion dollars of investment is pouring into our country right now because they want to be here with us. We have a lot of enemies, but we also have a lot of friends. And I think I know who's going to win on November 6th. It's not even close, but that's okay. They can have their shot. And maybe they're going to surprise me. But I don't think so. I think it's very clear. The Democrats are in shambles. There's no way. If I weren't running, if I were a betting person… Look, if I had a casino or something like that, I wouldn't want to bet against myself. That's the only thing I would never do. You got to stick with your family. I'd stick with my wife. She's doing great. She's really doing good, too. She wants to get back to her career. But she was a great first lady. She did a great job. She's got nothing to prove. She doesn't want to run for office. She just loves life. She's happy. She's happy being with the grandchildren. She's happy. But I think it's pretty much set. I mean, nobody knows. Nobody knows. Polls go up and down. They could take a poll tomorrow and I could lose by 15 points and then two weeks later, I could win by 20. So all polls are worthless. They're completely worthless. But what we've done is incredible. And if I didn't do it, there would be no Republican Party. There would be no Republican Party. They said, "What? Are you talking about the election?" Yes, I am talking about the election. If I didn't do it, there would be no Republican Party. Because the Republicans, as of three years ago, had no money. We have no money. In fact, we gave away all our money to people that cheated us, frankly. They cheated us out of everything. They made fortunes. And the Republican Party was dead. I said, "I love the Republican Party." I wanted to save it. I wanted to make it strong again. Now, I'm president. I saved it. Now, the Democrat Party's in real trouble. They have no spirit anymore. They have no spirit. Their base has left them. I read the other day that their base hates them. The Bernie Sanders group hates them. Kamala Harris hates them. All these people hate each other

And I have to tell you, unknown, the fake news media won't report this but things are changing fast. It's a disgrace. 11 states have already adopted my plan of no income tax for our people, including some very Democrat-run states like Connecticut and Maryland. And in those states where they're not doing it, they're talking about it because they don't want to get hit with an exodus of population. I'm pleased to say that last week alone, 10,000 people left California. They went to places like Nevada, Florida, Texas, and even West Virginia. That's why we got a great governor there, Jim Justice, who's really doing a fantastic job. We also secured a record-setting trade deal with Japan that covers all trade issues between the two countries. This is another one they said could never be done. The fake news says every day, "Oh, he can't do this." We did it on steel and aluminum. We had the best tariffs ever, the biggest tariffs ever, and now we've done it on Japan. We've got a great relationship with Prime Minister Kishida. He was here just a short while ago and he said, "I love Trump." I said, "I love him too." So we've gotten together something called a mega-deal, a big deal. And if we didn't do it, Japan would have taken advantage of us like China has taken advantage of us. China has taken advantage of us so badly. The worst thing I think that's happened to America is this invasion at our southern border by people coming into our country from prisons and mental institutions, drug dealers, gang members, murderers, and people from jails all over the world. We're taking them out of our jails, putting them into our jails. But before we were president, we had lawlessness, and now we're bringing law back. Our cities are becoming safe again. People are being arrested. It's been amazing what's happened. And now we have a new attorney general who's going to be terrific. Pam Bondi. Pam Bondi. Pam Bondi : Yes sir. President Donald J. Trump : She's going to be terrific. She knows how to do it right. Pam Bondi : Thank you, Mr. President. President Donald J. Trump : Thank you very much. Now, we have peace through strength. If we didn't have strength, we wouldn't have peace. We have peace in the Middle East. We have peace in Israel and Gaza and the Palestinian Authority. Nobody thought this was possible. But after four years, nobody thought it was possible. Everybody said, "You're

I've already answered that. The answer is very clear. On the economy and national security, we are doing better than any administration in history. 100%. If you look at that chart, that's the best growth. And the reason it's a long term, the biggest factor in that growth is Donald Trump, who is a great president. He has made this country strong again. He was an amazing president. So I think we can build on that. But if you're looking at the numbers, it doesn't matter what party you are, there's no question about that. We have had massive economic growth. Growth is not only record breaking, but it's also sustainable. When you do things like tariffs, when you do things like cutting ridiculous regulations, you make the economy strong. You make it resilient so that it can take hits. It's going to be able to take hits from the Fed raising interest rates or from anything else. You have an economy that's very resilient. That's why I'm saying if you look at this chart, it doesn't matter which party you are, because everybody should want to see good economic performance. They want to see their kids have a future. They don't want to see inflation. Nobody wants to see prices go up. Nobody wants to see energy prices go up. Nobody wants to see the cost of healthcare go up. Those things happen under Biden. They didn't happen under us. So regardless of whether you're Democrat or Republican, the answer to your question is yes, we will continue the policies that led to that massive growth, but we will add new ones. As we know, we cannot cut taxes for billionaires. That's what Trump did, and we're happy he did. But now the challenge is how do we give more money back to the people? How do we help the middle class? And that's exactly what we'll be talking about in these debates. Thanks for the question. Thank you. Audience :. Marco Rubio : Well, first of all, the idea that I'm some sort of puppet of someone is absurd. But even if that were true, here's the problem with that theory: if you wanted to control me, you would have told me not to sign the bill. So either they control me through some mysterious way, or they are incompetent. And that is not going to be the approach of our campaign. I'm not running as a continuation of President Trump. I'm running as a person who believes in the principles of free enterprise, individual liberty, low taxes, balanced budgets, common sense, and the rule of law. Those are my principles, and those are what I'm going to

And I have to tell you, unknown, the fake news media won't report this but things are changing fast. It's a disgrace. 1.4 trillion dollars were lost in our stock market last week. That was after we had the largest increase ever of any country in stock market value for 11 months in a row and now they're trying to tank it. We don't let that happen. And we got a lot of help from China, by the way, because they know if we go down, they go down. So we're helping them too. But there's never been anything like what happened last week. It was caused by the Democrats who want to raise interest rates to the highest level ever seen before. Think of that. The highest level ever seen before. They say that they're going to cause inflation, which is the exact opposite of what actually happens when you do it. Inflation goes down. You go to the grocery store. Food prices come down, rent comes down, mortgage payments come down, car payments come down, everything comes down. Interest rates should be lowered not raised. This is the most uneducated group of people that ever existed. So they wanted to raise interest rates, which caused all those trillions of dollars to be taken out of our stock market. But then yesterday, on top of that, we had 10% of the stock market get sold off due to a tax. Now, that's the Biden-Obama tax that we put on, which was designed to go away as soon as we got rid of the Democrat administration. So as soon as we get rid of the Democrat administration, I would've said, "Let's go ahead and take that tax off." But they didn't get voted out. But here's what I did. I said, "Look, we don't have a Democrat administration anymore, so let's take the tax off," even though it wasn't supposed to go off until next year. I took the tax off. Nobody has ever done anything like that. I took the tax off. So if you buy stocks today, you pay no tax. If you sell stocks today, you pay no tax. So we took the tax off. I said, "We'll leave it on if they win," but they didn't win. They didn't win. The Republicans won big in every single swing state, except maybe one. I think we're going to win that one too. So we took the tax off and we took the tax off immediately, which means if you buy stock today, you pay no tax. If you sell stock today, you pay no tax. And nobody's ever heard

That's a very unfair question. But I'll answer it anyway. On the issue of the economy, we have done more in two years than others did in eight. 2.25% inflation is the lowest level in decades. Growth has been tremendous and we are number one. We had the worst growth, actually, before I came along. We had the worst growth in our country. Now we're leading China by a lot. We're leading everyone by a lot. So if you look at growth, we've never had anything like that. And we're bringing trillions of dollars into our country from foreign nations because they want to invest here. They don't want to put their money in other countries anymore. They want to put their money back here where we have freedom and safety and security. And so with all of that, everything else takes care of itself. Inflation goes down, prices go down, interest rates go down. It doesn't matter what side of the aisle you're on, you should be very proud of this president. He's making America great again. Donald Trump : Thank you. Audience member : Thank you. President Trump : Thank you. Speaker 1 : Mr. President, when will you release your tax returns? Donald Trump : Well, we released some financial information today, but we haven't released them yet. We hope to do that soon. Audience member : When? Donald Trump : No, not now. Audience member : When? Donald Trump : Not until the audit comes out. Audience member : When will the audit come out? Donald Trump : Well, that depends on who we're up against. If we're up against somebody like Hillary Clinton or someone who was very bad for our country, then we would probably want to wait until just before the election. If we were up against somebody that wasn't really too bad, then maybe we'd do it sooner. But right now, there's no reason for me to do it sooner. I think we made the right decision. Audience member : Do you trust Special Counsel Jack Smith? Donald Trump : Yes. I do. Audience member : Have you spoken to him recently? Donald Trump : Not recently. I think he's doing a good job. Audience member : Do you believe that he's going after the right people? Donald Trump : He's going after the people that he thinks are wrong. I disagree with him in many cases, but that's his job. Audience member : Do you have any comments about- Donald Trump : Go ahead. Audience member : Do you have any comments about the fact that he hasn't issued an indictment on you? Donald Trump : Well, I hope he does a good job, whatever

We love unknown. We love the people of unknown. And we are going to win so big. Let me tell you about the economy and national security. 3,000 years ago, Egypt was a powerful country with tremendous resources and influence. Today it's a failed state ruled by terrorists. That's what we're up against. It's not even our imagination. Our economy is growing at numbers that nobody thought were possible. For eight long years, Joe Biden devastated America with his horrible energy policies, driving gasoline prices through the roof. He put the United States in a position where we were actually paying more for oil than Venezuela and Iraq. Can you believe that? I got gasoline down to $2.99 a gallon. They said, "Sir, that's impossible." I got it down below three dollars a gallon. Now he wants to raise them back up to $4.00, $5.00, and beyond. When I came here, we had no steel mills. We have now nine of the largest steel mills anywhere in the world right here in Indiana. So many other things happened. The fake news media won't talk about it because they don't want to give me credit. They don't want to admit how good we've done. But we've been a great nation and we're going to be an even greater nation. We're going to be a nation like never before. We are producing massive amounts of electricity again, and those prices are coming down also. You see the electric rates are way down, but you will see them come way down as we produce electricity. When you look at all the different plants that we're building, including my favorite one, nuclear. If I had my way, we would only have nuclear power. We have the safest plant ever built. The plant has no emissions and no greenhouse gases. Nobody knows this better than the farmers. And if you want to talk about farmers, which I think we should, because we've done so much for agriculture, we're doing great with agriculture, but there's no reason why the future shouldn't belong to American farmers. We must do everything we can to make sure that happens. We are getting rid of burdensome regulations on hardworking farm families. We're making it easier for farmers to get financing, and we're ending the war on tractors once and for all. Who knew? That sounds good when I say that. We're making it easier for farmers to buy land and borrow money. There's nothing more important to us than having a strong and healthy agricultural sector, and we'll soon be number one in the world. By the way, we're also bringing jobs back home from foreign countries

This is a big day. A very big day for unknown. Because we are going to talk about making America great again. 12 months ago, our country was in bad shape. The economy was dead and the stock market was down 5000 points, gasoline prices were through the roof, inflation was at 9% and the grocery stores were empty. We had no president because President Trump was impeached by people who hated him so much they wanted to throw me out of office. They tried everything but couldn't do it. I think they will try something else someday, but you can never be too careful. For that reason, today I'm proud to announce that during my first year back in the White House, I have completely turned around the economy, fixed the mess left behind by incompetent Democrats and brought us back from the brink. And now we're on the road to prosperity like never before. In fact, we are having a record-breaking period of growth with jobs pouring into our country and new investment pouring into our country. We have the hottest economy anywhere in the world right now. You see that? Nobody's got anything close to what we've done. But when I took office, there was nothing but darkness. It was called the Dark Ages. That's what we inherited. So I came up with a plan. My plan is called Make America Great Again. And it really does work. So I said, "How do we get this going?" I said, "Well, I'll go over to Europe." I went over to Europe and they laughed at me. They thought I was crazy. They said, "No way. You don't know how good you have it here." So I went to China, same thing happened. They didn't want to deal with me either. I said, "What am I going to do?" So I looked at it. I looked at different places. I looked at all the different countries. I picked seven that I thought would be good to start off with, and I started talking to them. Then one after another, I added countries until I ended up with 46 countries. If I put any more on, I'd have to take away from the ones that I have. I thought it would be easy. It wasn't. Some people would agree and some wouldn't agree. I said, "We're doing this whether you like it or not." And then I used tariffs as leverage against those who didn't want to play ball with me. The tariffs have been incredible. We're bringing trillions of dollars back into our country. That's money that was stolen, taken out of our country.

Crooked Democrats are doing it again. THE ECONOMY AND NATIONAL SECURITY. TOTAL DISASTER! We need to 100% repeal and disband the insane Green New Scam, and get our country back to being energy independent again. As of now, we have ZERO energy independence. I don't know if you've noticed that lately. But we're going to do something about it very soon. They say, "Well, it's not good for the environment." No, it's not good for the environment when we lose all our electricity and lose everything else because they're shutting down all the plants. You see what's happening? They're shutting down all the coal plants. The coal plants are getting destroyed, by the way, by the Biden administration. They want to destroy all the coal plants. And then we'll be in a real mess. So no, it's not good for the environment when you have no power. When you have no heat, you will die. That's bad for the environment. What happens when your car dies? What happens when your refrigerator dies? And I mean, there's nothing worse than losing your child in the middle of winter, freezing cold, with no heat. It's no good for the environment. People are dying right now. People are dying of the cold. A lot of people are dying of the cold. It's the coldest day ever recorded in Minnesota on November 30th. Ever recorded, 52 years, 31 below zero, windchill at negative 63. Now, who would think of that? Who could even dream of that? Who could even dream of that kind of cold? And they still say, "Oh, climate change is a hoax." I'm telling you, they're lunatics. I hope they never go out in that weather. They say it's the coldest ever recorded in Minnesota. In Minnesota. Think of that. If you were here today, you'd have some nice fires going. We had 15 days of fires last year. 15 days. We're doing a lot better this year. This year, we had one fire in Hawaii where somebody forgot to put out their cigarette. But other than that, we haven't had any fires. We had the best season of fire fighting that we've ever had, because we went around and knocked the hell out of them before they started. There was nobody coming up behind us to fight the fire. The best season of fire fighting we've ever had. But we're going to have more because we're starting earlier. We're starting much earlier so we can put those fires out before they

Hello unknown! What a crowd, what a beautiful crowd. Now, I want to talk about the economy. Nobody talks about this. 3 years ago, we inherited an economic catastrophe. We had the worst inflation in the history of our country. We had the worst price hike on gasoline in the history of our country. We had a stock market that was losing 2,000 points every single day. The world was laughing at us and they're not laughing anymore. Our economy is booming like never before. And it's the greatest economy anywhere in the world right now. For example, if you look at China, their growth rate has come down from 10% to 5%. That's not good. Japan is coming down from 6% to 1%. India's coming down from 7% to 4%. Germany's coming down from 6% to 0%. Russia's coming down from 8% to 2%. UK's coming down from 7% to negative numbers. Spain is going from 9% to negative numbers. Italy's coming down from 6% to 0%. And Switzerland is coming down from 7% to 1%. So for all of those countries that have just been named, their economies are either negative or very low, as you see, compared to ours. And when we first came into office, they were all higher than we were. They've all gone down. Their growth rates have all gone down. And if you look at growth, that means employment too, because when people go out and get jobs, they need cars to drive to work. They need money to buy food. They need money to buy houses. They need money to pay their rent. All of these things happen. And with the biggest tax cuts ever given to the people of our country, that's why we're doing so well. And by the way, we're leading China by a lot. We used to be behind them. We're leading China by a lot. And we think that's going to continue. And we're the hottest country anywhere in the world right now. And we have a great president who knows how to do it. And he does it better than anybody else. He's also the most popular president in history. Who would have thought? With your leadership and our incredible allies, we've secured trade deals with more nations than any administration in American history. And we're getting ready to sign one of the largest trade deals ever made, which will bring millions and millions and millions of dollars pouring into our country and creating trillions and trillions and trillions of dollars of value. If you think about that

Look, I'll tell you this — the economy and national security. Very simple. Nobody else will say it. I'll say it. 8 trillion dollars has been lost by this country over the last four years. And I rebuilt it to being number one in the world, as we were for a long time. The stock market hit record numbers every day for seven months in a row. We have the hottest stock market that there is anywhere in the world. And that's because people are buying American again. They're making money in America again. And they're investing in America again. But the biggest thing of all is that we have the hottest stock market anywhere in the world. So now when you take the cost of energy down, the price of gasoline comes down, everything comes down, so prices come down. And the whole world wants to invest in America again, including foreign nations. That's why we have peace in the Middle East. We never would've had peace if we didn't bring oil prices down. Because if we hadn't brought them down, the oil countries would've kept pumping. And the price of oil, instead of going down, would've gone up even higher than what they're at right now. So peace in the Middle East was very important. And also, we got the hostages back from Iran. You saw that. And we got a lot of hostages back. It wasn't just those three. So think of it. Think of all those families who had children kidnapped or family members kidnapped, and they came home with us. There were hundreds of people that were brought out. We have a list of 542, but it could be more than that. And we're bringing them out. They're coming into our country from all parts of the world. Other presidents wouldn't do that. Other presidents wouldn't want to get them back. They'd rather let them rot in prison or let them die in jail. We don't do that. We got them out. We took them out, and they're coming into our country. Many of them are coming into our country. And many of them, we're sending to their country, because they want to go home. If we didn't have peace in the Middle East, we couldn't have gotten them back. And I'm proud of getting them back. In my opinion, it's one of the most important things that we did. Not only are we bringing them back from death, we're saving thousands and thousands of lives around the globe. We're saving thousands and thousands of lives, which is really an honor. So, the best way to save lives is to prevent war. That's

That's a very unfair question. But I'll answer it anyway. On the issue of the economy, we have done more in two years than others did in eight. 2025 has been an incredible year for the American people and our country. For example, in 2026, President Trump signed the largest tax cuts in American history that put more money in workers' pockets to buy cars and houses, and created thousands of new jobs. He also kept his promise to terminate the job-killing electric vehicle mandate, which was designed to make gasoline vehicles obsolete. In addition, he negotiated historic trade deals with South Korea, Japan, Mexico, Canada, Europe, India, China, and other countries to lower prices for Americans, open markets, and grow our economy. And because of these policies, wages are growing at the fastest pace in 25 years. Inflation is coming down. And consumer confidence is up. So yes, we inherited an economic mess. But under this president, we've fixed it, and we're now leading the world once again. We have no debt, we have no inflation. We have nothing but growth. With that, we can go on to foreign policy. In foreign policy, we've ended wars. We've brought peace back to the Middle East, which they never had before. We've brokered agreements like no one ever thought possible. We're bringing 21 million people home from prisons, jails, gang members, drug dealers, murderers, rapists, who came into our country illegally and unconstitutionally. We're bringing them home. The Biden administration gave them sanctuary, and that was wrong. That's what happens when you elect Democrats. And we're ending the war on oil and gas, restoring energy dominance here in America, and making energy affordable and abundant again. And that's just a small part of it. This president has achieved more in two years than most presidents achieve in four. And I'm proud to say that I stand behind him every single day, whether there's a microphone or not. Thank you all for being here today. Donald J. Trump :. Speaker 1 :. Donald J. Trump : Thank you. Topics: Politics Hungry For More? Luckily for you, we deliver. Subscribe to our blog today. Thank you unknown! This is an incredible crowd. You know, we have to talk about what's happening with the economy and national security. 8 months ago we were a country that was being ripped apart by Joe Biden's insane open border policy, which led to the invasion of our southern border and it didn't happen by accident, it happened because he wanted to destroy America. And I've given up on him, actually. He's destroyed his reputation. He's a disaster. A terrible president. We're in a recession now, but think of this, we inherited the worst inflation in 48 years from him. Think of this. And yet, despite that we've got record setting investment pouring into our country like nobody has ever seen before. And that's why we are back in growth, we're not going down anymore. It's amazing. I'm so proud of all of us for what we're doing. So, it was the worst inflation. And then we had a great election victory where I won every swing state except one, Nevada, and I would say we won that one also, if you look at everything else, right? The polls were rigged. We won all seven swing states. We won every single poll. But it turns out they were rigged. They were fake polls. So, we ended up winning everything but one. In other words, we won everything. But we went out and we campaigned very hard in Nevada, and I said, "We'll win Nevada," and we did, we won Nevada. But it turned out that the Democrats cheated there as well. But we won every poll, even though they say we didn't. But we won every poll in every single swing state, including Florida, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, Michigan, Minnesota, and Ohio. We won them all. Nobody can believe it. And I don't want to take anything away from the people of Nevada. You came through for us last time and hopefully you will again. We hope. But we won every single poll, and when we won them, that's when I knew we'd be winning. But they said we weren't, they said, "No, no, no, no." They said, "We won't lose an election without cheating. That's the way we make money." I mean, that's how they do it. They don't win elections. They cheat to win. They stole the White House from me in 2020. That's why I came here today. They stole it. They didn't steal it from me twice, they stole it once and I'm coming after them. And I think you understand that, right? You

This is a big day. A very big day for unknown. Because we are going to talk about making America great again. 10 months ago, I inherited an economy that was terrible. It wasn't good. And now it's the hottest economy in the world and I think I can say even better than China because our stock market is up more than China, but China has done a fantastic job. They've brought it back from nothing. We have the hottest country anywhere in the world right now. So we're doing great. But when I took over, we had an economy where we were losing jobs every month. Now we're gaining jobs at record levels like you see today. And I want to thank the National Association of Manufacturers for being here today, but I also want to thank those people on television who thought that this would be a bad day for me. They'll find out very soon how wrong they really are. They'll find out pretty soon how wrong they really are. The first time they ever heard me speak, Donald Trump : … was 100 years ago. That's what they said. This is the second time I'm speaking. It's a little bit later than the last time. We've had a couple of meetings. We have a lot of important things happening today. We're bringing back America. In just 11 months, we have made the United States of America a nation once again that's respected around the world. We're respected all over the world right now. And they call us strong again. Strong again. We're proud again. We're respected again. We have peace through strength. It's incredible. Think of it. One year ago, we faced a failed foreign policy that gave away American wealth, power, security, and freedom to other countries and nations. One year ago, we had a president who refused to admit that he lost an election fair and square and who caused chaos in our streets, but most importantly, who caused mayhem in our economy with his disastrous policies.
