We hit 2%. But even 1% is good, because we came from dead money, as Biden left us. We inherited a dead country. It was a dead country. I mean, it was really dead. Inflation was through the roof. Energy prices were through the roof. Interest rates were through the roof. Growth was dead. You couldn't get any. If you wanted to build a building or anything, you couldn't borrow money. You'd go to a bank. They'd say, "We can't give you a loan. Sorry." That was the situation. It was called dead money. So when we got 1%, it was great. When we got 1.25, it was great. Now, if we can get 2%, we think we'll get 2.75 next year, and then it goes higher after that. We want to see it go higher. That's why the tax cuts are so important. We cut

Hello unknown! What a crowd, what a beautiful crowd. Now, I want to talk about the economy. Nobody talks about this. 8% growth is good. That's great. But I want to talk about something else, because it's very important for you. And we've done things that nobody thought was possible. We have the hottest country anywhere in the world right now and we have the hottest stock market. You know why? Because of regulation. I'm not going to let them cheat like they did before. They used to say, "Trump, you're crazy." They'd go out and make a deal. They'd call up somebody and they'd make a deal at one price, but then when Trump came along they said, "Well, we're sorry sir. It turns out that the price went up 50%," or 200%, or whatever it may be. So if you wanted to buy a house, if you wanted to do anything with real estate, it went up so high that people couldn't afford it anymore. If they had a mortgage on their house, all of a sudden the value went way up, but the mortgage didn't. So they were losing money on a home. We fixed all of that nonsense, so you can buy a house again. For 12 years before me, they had no housing. People were living in their cars. In some cases, people lived under bridges. And now we have more houses being built than there are buyers. There's never been anything like it. They're building thousands of apartments. We have the greatest numbers ever recorded, and yet our prices are coming down. That's called an omelet. You break eggs to make an omelet. We broke a lot of eggs, and now we have a great omelet. So if you want to buy a house, and even if you don't want to buy a house, your house has gone up by much more than the price of the mortgage. Your mortgage isn't going up by double and triple. So we have the greatest numbers ever recorded, and yet our prices are coming down. That's called an omelet. You break eggs to make an omelet. We broke a lot of eggs, and now we have a great omelet. So if you want to buy a house, and even if you don't want to buy a house, your house has gone up by much more than the price of the mortgage. Your mortgage isn't going up by double and triple. Interest rates are at record lows. When I first came into office, interest rates were too high. They brought them down.

Next question. Yes, you. About trade policy — I'll tell you, nobody knows this better than me. 47 years, I've been in the business. I've done everything. We have a great relationship with Japan. Great relationship with China, we just signed an agreement. And I was really surprised when President Xi said that he would like to make a deal before November of '24 because he wants it for his people and they need it for their people, too. So we're going to see what happens, but I think it's good for both sides. The problem is that the tariffs are the only leverage that we have. They keep us safe, they keep our country safe. They keep our workers safe and they keep our businesses safe. Now, I'm not saying they're always fair. In some cases, they're not. But the tariffs are very high on China right now, $500 billion, $300 billion. And if we were to take them off or bring them down… This is why I put the new thing called the National Security Tariff. That means if somebody doesn't treat us well, I can slap a tariff. If they don't do something that's fair, I can slap a tariff. And so far, everybody's behaving themselves. I mean, China, as I said, President Xi has agreed to go ahead and try and make a deal before the election. He doesn't want to make a deal after the election because I might be more aggressive, but we'll see how it works out. But I was disappointed by Europe, who I thought was going to be much stronger against Russia. I thought they'd be much tougher, but they weren't. They ended up buying oil from Russia at a discount, which is crazy, but they did it anyway. So I had to put the European Union on the list. But look, these are all countries that are friends of mine. These are countries that we've had a long-term relationship with and we understand each other. It's never easy. I will say that I put a lot of pressure on all of these countries to make sure that they behave properly. And many of them didn't. But again, we have no choice. If we don't do it, there's no chance of survival. We would be destroyed. And I wouldn't want to see that happen. I wouldn't want to see that happen. No president would want to see that happen. You know? But I have great relationships with every one of those countries. There's only one country that I don't have a relationship with and that's North Korea. But we're

Laura, the thing people don't understand is the economy. I mean, the numbers speak for themselves. 9.1% growth in GDP in the last quarter of 2025, and that's the highest number we've seen in a long time. And all the things that you said about gas prices and inflation are true. So it's amazing to me that Democrats still want to run on this stuff because they're out of ideas. They have no ideas. But when you think about it, if Biden had gotten his way and they hadn't been stopped at the border, we would be looking at a completely different country today. We would have millions of illegals into our country, many of whom came from prisons and mental institutions. And so what we're doing right now, I'm taking them back home where they belong, getting them the help they need. If they want to be good citizens, they will. It's not easy, but some do come through. But mostly they want to go home. They just want to get the hell out of America. So we're bringing them back home. And it's incredible what's happening. Our country is going up. Our stock market is at an all-time high. I rebuilt the military, as you know. The fact is, I've done more than any other president by far. I restored law and order. Crime has plummeted. Murders are down. Violent crime is down. And the Democrat mayors are not happy about it. In Chicago, J.B. Pritzker, who was a terrible governor and he was a terrible mayor before he became a governor, he doesn't want the job. He wants to be rich again. He wants to make money. He doesn't care. So he's leaving. He wants to get out of town. So he says, "I got to do something." He ran for governor. He lost badly. Then he said, "Well, maybe I'll try being a mayor." He got elected. He was a disaster, but he won. Now he's running away from the mess that he created. He wants to leave the mess to somebody else. So he's leaving. And the guy they have now is a woman named Brandon Johnson. She used to be a community organizer. She's never worked a day in her life, actually. But she's running for mayor. She's really bad, but that's what they put forward. And I told everybody. I said, "She's going to lose to anybody except me, because I'm very popular with the Blacks and Hispanics." And we have tremendous popularity with

And I said it at the time — I said it years ago — the economy and national security. And now look what happened. 47 months in a row of economic growth, that's never happened before. The stock market is up by trillions of dollars. We have no wars, we have no wars, we have no wars. We have peace through strength, we don't have peace through weakness. We're not going to let people shoot missiles off and kill our citizens or attack us in any way, shape, or form. So they say, "What about Ukraine?" Well, Russia attacked Ukraine. They should never have attacked them because President Putin asked me many times not to put sanctions on him. But if you don't have sanctions, he attacks. He would have attacked Norway, Denmark, Sweden. He would have attacked anybody. He was waiting for this opportunity. It wasn't his fault, it was Joe Biden's fault who got us into this mess. And as soon as we get out of there, he'll make a deal with Ukraine. And maybe he already has, but we know they've had talks. And the world knows how bad a deal he made for himself with NATO and Ukraine and everything else. He got nothing in return. We have peace through strength. If we didn't have peace through strength, we'd be under attack right now from all over the place, and you wouldn't even be talking. You'd be hiding underground. It's an honor to be with you all. Thank you very much. Thank you, everybody. Speaker 5 : Thank you so much. Mr. President, thank you for that. I wanted to ask you about some of your executive orders. One of them that you signed last week, which really has resonated with people is the student loan forgiveness. Can you tell us why you think it was such a great idea? Donald Trump : Well, we have millions and millions of young people being held hostage by loans that are unpayable, that they will never pay back. And we're canceling their debt. That's something nobody else has ever done. No president has ever canceled debt like that. But they have to agree to go to school, and they have to agree to work. In other words, they can't just sit around and collect money. They have to work, and they have to go to school. But they're going to save hundreds of thousands of dollars. Millions of people have been ripped off by colleges that have charged tremendous amounts of money, sometimes more than the house cost. They've been ripped off. And they've gone to schools where they can't find a job

Sean, I have to tell you — and nobody wants to talk about this — but the economy and national security. The numbers are incredible. 10 million jobs in one year. They were losing 300,000 a month under Biden. We're adding at levels like we've never seen before. And then you look at energy, oil, gasoline prices, electricity prices, everything is way down. So what happens? All of a sudden they come out with an inflation number that's not accurate. It's totally inaccurate because if you look at food costs, they went up by 15%. That's the highest number ever recorded. That should be 0% or less than 1%, but it was 15%. And if you look at other things, they came down. I mean, even steel has come down from $2,000 a ton to $600 a ton. But no, we got the worst inflation number ever. Inflation was high when Joe Biden left office. He created the problem. We solved the problem. Now he's going to claim credit for it. No, he caused the problem. His policies caused the problem. So now all of a sudden they come out with a bad number on inflation. And yet, as I say, gasoline prices are way down. Electricity prices are way down. Food prices should be way down. If the grocery stores didn't jack their prices up, they would be way down. But instead of saying, "Congratulations," they say, "This is terrible." That's why we need new people in Congress who aren't puppets. Who aren't owned by these companies that pay them off. We got to get somebody in there that doesn't do that. Because if they do that again, we'll really have problems. I think we will. We'll see how it works. I thought we had it made until last night. No, we had it made. Then they said, "Well, let's make it better." I'd say, "Let's try and make it better, but keep it strong." They don't want to do that. They just want to go crazy. But anyway, I'm pleased to report that during my first term, we slashed 12 trillion dollars' worth of regulations, cutting burdensome red tape to free our economy to grow like few others. Our country grew faster than any other major nation, and we took in more money through tariffs than any other country has ever taken in. Think of that. We took in more money through tariffs. And with every deal that I did, whether it was the best deal ever made with Japan or the deal with Canada where we lost $

We love unknown. We love the people of unknown. And we are going to win so big. Let me tell you about the economy and national security. 7 months ago, America was on a path of decline, our country was being laughed at all over the world. The Biden administration set us on that path. Inflation was out of control, prices were soaring, energy production was down by 50%, gasoline prices were up 59%, and grocery store prices were up 29%. One year ago today, the Biden administration raised gasoline taxes. And they did it because it's called raiding the treasury. They wanted money for other things. So they put the tax up from $0.18 to $1.00 per gallon. I had to get rid of it. Within one month, we got it back down to less than half of what they charged. You go to New York now and you see it's $2.25. It should be lower. That's why we have no tax on oil. We're making great progress with the states and we're working on the governors. They want to keep the price low. But if you go to New Jersey, you'll see the price is high. You go to California, the price is high. And they've caused this problem, but we're bringing it down very quickly. And in six months, they've brought it down by more than half, but that's not good enough. But when you look at inflation, the last time there was inflation like that was during the Carter years. In addition, under Biden, we lost nearly $6 trillion in value of stock market wealth. When Biden came into office, stocks were at an all-time high. If you remember, he said, "Oh, well, we inherited a mess." He didn't inherit anything. He made a mess. And then he destroyed our energy production. Remember when he blew up the Keystone pipeline? Now, every day, I'm opening up pipelines all over the country, including the largest pipeline ever built. We have the largest pipeline ever built right now. We just turned on the valve. It's never been done before. Think of that. It's never been done before. For the first time in history, the United States of America has achieved true energy independence. And nobody thought that was possible. People would say, "Well, it can't be done." But it wasn't even thinkable until four weeks ago. Nobody was thinking about it. You know how many years, generations, decades, centuries, maybe longer, since we've had energy independence? Never. And now we do. And it's the biggest thing that's

Reporter question about the economy and national security. Look, it's very simple. We've been saying this for a long time. 10 years, I think, we've said it. And if you go back to Obama, he was always blaming Trump on tariffs. He was doing nothing but complaining about them. He never put any tariffs in place. The only reason he had tariffs was because of us, because of our threat. Because we threatened him with tariffs and so they came up with tariffs. But those were like peanuts compared to what we're talking about now. And actually, the stock market is up 1,500 points today. And that's based on the fact that we have peace through strength. That's why the markets are going up. That's why everything else is going up. It's called peace through strength. And if we don't have peace through strength, then we don't have anything. So we will be putting tariffs. And we'll see how they react to that. They won't be able to do anything about it. We have total power over them. We also have a lot of respect for China right now because of what's happened. Reporter : Is there a chance that these tariffs could slow down economic growth? President Trump : No, no. Reporter : Could there be some kind of- President Trump : Well, we hope not. Reporter : -of an inflationary problem? President Trump : We hope not. That's something I'm watching. There's no doubt. When you raise rates, there's no doubt that when you raise interest rates too high, it's going to kill the economy. Now, the Fed has done exactly what we asked them to do. We told them to get interest rates down. They got them way down. That's good for us. But when you get them too low or too high, that's bad. And the worst thing you can do is too high. Too low is okay, but too high is a disaster. And I really believe, I just spoke with Chairman Powell yesterday, I really believe that we have the best Federal Reserve chairman by far we've ever had. He understands what we're trying to do. He wants to bring interest rates down. And I think he's doing a fantastic job. Reporter : Mr. President, I'd like to ask you a question about your decision earlier today to veto the resolution to terminate the emergency declaration at the Southern border. Donald Trump : Yes, please. Speaker 3 : Are you concerned that by vetoing this resolution, that this is going to have implications for the broader negotiations between yourself and Democrats in Congress over funding the government and

This is a big day. A very big day for unknown. Because we are going to talk about making America great again. 11 months ago, this was an unremarkable plant with some good workers who were struggling in an industry that had been decimated by bad trade deals and incompetent leadership. But now it's thriving. And you know why? Because the United States of America has a new president who keeps his promises. That's what I do. When I took office last year, this factory was on life support. You would not have believed it. The lights were dim. The machinery was obsolete. The future was bleak. And it was just so sad. The whole place was so sad. Then one day, someone came up with a wild idea. Let's give President Trump a call and see if he can save our business. They thought I couldn't be saved, but they called anyway. And within hours, everything changed. Everything changed. This place was buzzing. There were cranes in the sky. Contractors all over the place. It was like a Christmas miracle. Now look at us. We're making more steel than ever before. Our workers are proud and confident once again. So thank you, Mr. President, for saving our company. Thank you. This is incredible. We have thousands of people coming through here today from across America. I want to say hello to everybody. Hello everybody. How are you? What a crowd. Look at these crowds. Is there any place where you could get a crowd like this? Are there any places in the world? If you try, you won't get the same reaction. We have tremendous spirit. We have a lot of spirit. We're getting things done fast. You hear me saying, "Fast." That's my favorite word. Fast. I've done more in less than a year than Joe Biden did in eight years. He was terrible. He ruined the country. And we're putting it back together. Look at our stock market. Stock market is at record highs. All records. All numbers. We have a great economy. That's the only thing you need. That's the most important thing. And we have a great economy right now because we have no inflation. Inflation's come down by double digits. Energy prices are way down. You saw gasoline is way down. And when you go to buy your car, you'll be shocked. It's really knocked out. For the first time in decades, we have the lowest price of oil in the history of our country. In other words, energy is way down. Food is way down. Housing is way down. We

Sean, I have to tell you — and nobody wants to talk about this — but the economy and national security. The numbers are incredible. 12 months ago, we had $2 trillion of trade deficit with China, $2 trillion. Today, it's down to $400 billion. And as soon as we get the tariffs in place, which is very close, it'll be under $100 billion for the first time in many years. In addition to that, they were charging us a tremendous amount of money for energy from their oil rigs. We're now producing more oil than any country in the world, including them. They're having big problems right now. Their dollar's crashing. And when your dollar crashes, all sorts of things happen, especially if you have $16 trillion worth of debt like they do. And so, what happens? They charge us an exorbitant price for energy. That's over. They have no choice but to cut the price, because they don't want to see their currency collapse. But it is collapsing. So that was Biden. He allowed China to rip us off, cheat us on trade, and put us in this horrible position that we were just six months ago. Now, we've got the lowest inflation in 40 years, best consumer confidence in 52 years. People are coming back from other countries. And the border is closed. There's never been anything like it. Never. We have the strongest borders ever, and our border patrol has never been stronger. It's the biggest turnaround since November 5th, election day. And now, the United States is respected again. We're respected by everybody. We're respected at levels that we haven't seen in decades. For instance, with Venezuela, we had a meeting today where we were asked to come up and make a speech. That never would've happened even four months ago, let alone a year ago. We were treated poorly. We were disrespected. Now, we're treated extremely well. When you're disrespected, that means you're not doing a good job, and that's exactly what happened to our country. For the past seven years, our country was not being run properly. If it was, we wouldn't be talking about some of the things we're talking about today. One of the most important things is law enforcement. Our police force has been decimated, and our crime rate has gone way up. The Democrats caused the murder of thousands of people with their policies, because they said that the men and women who enforce the laws are bad. They hate our police officers. We love our police officers. We love our military. We

We love unknown. We love the people of unknown. And we are going to win so big. Let me tell you about the economy and national security. 12 months ago, inflation was raging at a record high under the Biden administration. The cost of everything from gasoline to groceries to rent was skyrocketing, and your savings were evaporating. Today, prices are falling like rocks all over our country, and interest rates are low. Your paychecks are getting bigger and bigger every month with the great Trump accounts. And most importantly, our country is safe again because of my leadership in the Oval Office. We have peace through strength. We are not going to be messed around anymore. Our border is closed, our country is respected again, our factories are booming again, energy prices are down. You see that? Energy prices are down. I got them down very quickly. It's called tariffs. And if they go up, it's called tariffs. We're doing great. Our stock market just set a new all-time high, the highest ever, for the 14th time in a row. And as you know, the last president, Joe Biden, had zero times in four years. Zero. So we hit number 14, and we expect to hit number 15 next week. We think we'll do pretty well. We've never done 14 before, let alone 15. And we also brought back $6 trillion of money, mostly made by foreign countries, but mostly made by foreign countries. We took trillions of dollars out of foreign countries and put them into America. They'd invest their money here because we have the best growth rate anywhere in the world. We have the biggest investment numbers anywhere in the world. They want to come here. They want to build their plants here. They want to build their offices here. They want to build their factories here. That includes AI, which has been a big deal. There's never been anything like AI. In fact, when I first heard of AI, I thought it was an insurance company. But it turns out it's artificial intelligence, and it's really taken off. I knew we had to move fast on that one too. We did, and we moved fast. The best price increases, lowest inflation, lowest energy costs, and strongest stock market in the history of our country. And that means that your 401s are hitting new records. Your stocks are hitting new records, and they will continue to do so. When you see these charts, when you see what's happened to our country since November 5th, I mean, since January 20th, I said it, "November 5th"

Thank you unknown! This is an incredible crowd. You know, we have to talk about what's happening with the economy and national security. 10 months ago, our country was in deep trouble. It was really bad trouble, but now America is booming like never before. We are number one again in everything. I mean, we're at number one again. It wasn't too long ago that they said, "They're dead." And then all of a sudden, it started going up and up. Then, we went up and up and up. Now, they say, "We've never had anything like this." So we have the greatest stock market rally in history, the hottest housing market ever, the lowest inflation in many years, the biggest surge in wages and salaries for working families in more than 40 years. If you go back 40 years, wages were very low. They're now very high. And the price of gasoline is at the lowest level in almost three years. All things that people would say are good news. But if we didn't do what we did, we'd be right now in a recession. We'd have no energy. Our gasoline prices would be through the roof. I hear from the other side, they want to raise taxes on energy. The only thing that matters is the cost of energy. That's the most important thing. Energy determines whether or not we have a great economy. Without energy, we don't have much of a country anymore because you need energy for just about everything. Electricity, heating your house. Everything runs off electricity. The Democrats in Congress tried to destroy our economy by holding our entire government hostage. Remember? Hostage. In fact, they caused a total shutdown of our government. We could have avoided that whole thing easily, but they forced us into a government shutdown. And remember, it's the Democrats who cause the shutdowns. And every time they do it, they have the highest unemployment numbers ever recorded, ever seen. Every time they do it, they have the highest unemployment. This time they had zero unemployment. We got 12 million jobs created since I took office. Think of that. We got 12 million jobs created. If we added them up, that's like 25, maybe even 30 million jobs. They're calling for 25, 26 million jobs. Nobody has ever seen anything like that. We also ended the Democrat war on oil and gas, which caused so much pain. And I have been called names. I've been called horrible names. I'm okay with that. I take it as a badge of honor. It doesn't bother me at all. The

And I have to tell you, unknown, the fake news media won't report this but things are changing fast. It's a disgrace. 100 years ago, we had a country that was totally unguarded and now it's impenetrable. Nobody gets in anymore, nobody gets out. You can see them trying, but they don't get out either. We're proud of our border patrol, and ICE and the people who protect us. So we'll always take care of them. They do an amazing job. And as of this moment, despite everything they throw at us, we've slashed inflation by almost one third. The last administration raised prices on everything from energy to groceries, from electricity to housing, from gasoline to cars. And when Biden took office, gas was under two bucks a gallon. That's what he bragged about. Well, in six months, it went up $2.50 a gallon. In one year, it was up $3.50 a gallon. Under President Trump, we've brought prices down. They're coming down every week. We're bringing gasoline back down to under $2 a gallon. Not only that, they were paying over $5 for electricity. We're getting it down to $0.12 per kilowatt hour. That's a big difference. In my first term, we made America affordable again. Now, in my second term, I want to make America prosperous again. We've done that too. We will make America unafraid again because we have no fear of God or man. We do not bow down before any king or dictator or foreign power. We stand tall and strong like a mighty fortress and defend liberty, faith and family. This is your movement, and together we will never stop fighting to make America great again. Thank you very much. Because under me, your 401s will be doing great, and Social Security will be doing great. And it will be good for everybody. We inherited a mess from Joe Biden. Right? This isn't happening, right? The Democrat Party has gone crazy. But the point is, every time they make these ridiculous statements about cutting Social Security… If they cut Social Security, I'm going to cut Medicare by five times as much. Okay? If they cut Social Security, I'm going to cut Medicare by five times as much. What happens to us if we lose Medicare? We don't win elections. They know that. They play dirty. They play dirty, but they know that. They're playing dirty this time too. But they know that. And that's

This is a big day. A very big day for unknown. Because we are going to talk about making America great again. 47 months ago, it was great. But now we're doing it again. And that's what we want. We're going to be talking about the economy and I think that's important because if you don't have an economy, you don't have anything. We're going to be talking about things like growth. Nobody can beat us on growth. We've never had growth like this before. It's incredible. And so we'll be talking about all of that. I will tell you, as an entrepreneur, as someone who came from nothing but grew something really big, I understand money better than anybody else in this room. I understand it much better than any Democrat. And they would love to see no growth. They would love to see no growth. In fact, they say, "Well, we don't want to grow because we'll create inflation." The only way you can create inflation is by having a bad president. Look at Europe right now with energy. Look at how energy prices are up 500%. That's a price that nobody should pay. Energy has to come down. We inherited a disaster when we took over. We got energy down 50% and I'm looking for 60 or even 70%. I'm looking for numbers that nobody thought were possible. They said, "Oh, 10%, 20%." You know why? Because Joe Biden gave away our whole country. He gave away our energy. He gave away everything. If he weren't such a nice person, I'd say, "What the hell is wrong with him?" But he's actually not such a nice person. He's a crooked guy. He's a corrupt guy. But he gave away our country. Okay, so on that issue, let me be very clear about something. 100% of the people in our country are entitled to a high quality, affordable health care plan and every single one of them will get it under this bill. Now, as I've said many times, we need to bring down the cost of prescription drugs for the American people, which is why President Trump signed an executive order last year to lower drug prices by up to 90%. And we're working with Congress right now on bipartisan legislation to make those savings permanent and put money back into the pockets of hardworking Americans. We also want to ensure that we have a system where patients can get access to the latest breakthrough treatments that they need and where doctors are not discouraged from prescribing new medicines. The best way to do that is through a drug pricing negotiation policy that allows us to negotiate directly with pharmaceutical companies and force them to pass their discounts on to consumers. President Trump has been committed to doing that since day one and he's been leading on this issue. But what we have seen from Democrats is nothing but obstruction and delay. So today, after months of Democrat delays, President Trump took action to deliver on his promise and sign the most significant piece of healthcare legislation in over 50 years. That is a fact. When you look at Obamacare, when you look at everything else, this is the largest thing done. It's the first time that we've taken prescription drugs out of the equation, made them negotiable. Nobody has ever negotiated before. This president, who always delivers, who always comes through, has done that for the American people. In addition to all of these benefits, we've given the American people more freedom to choose the healthcare coverage that works best for them and their families. For too long, politicians have dictated how Americans could buy and use healthcare. President Trump has changed that. He wants to give you the power to make decisions about your own healthcare. Under this bill, starting in 2026, Americans will be able to use pre-tax dollars to purchase the kind of plan that works for them. Whether it's a PPO, HMO, or any other type of insurance, they'll be able to buy the plan that works for them with tax-free dollars. They will also be able to use tax-free accounts to pay for medical expenses like prescriptions and other out-of-pocket costs, giving them more flexibility to tailor their coverage to fit their needs. As part of this bill, President Trump has directed HHS to establish a new website called healthcare.gov. This website will serve as a one-stop-shop for the American people

National security depends on steel. The steel industry is now booming like never before. And again, other than the fact that we fixed terrible trade deals that we inherited, that's the reason we've been successful. We're going to do everything we can to help make it happen. And we think there's a chance that it's going to work out. We think there's a chance. But it's never easy. And we're at peace in the Middle East. So, so many good things have happened. We'll be able to cut taxes in November.

Look, I'll tell you this — the economy and national security. Very simple. Nobody else will say it. I'll say it. 47% of our GDP comes from energy. We don't have any energy right now. And we're working very hard to get energy back in this country because without that, the United States is not going to be able to continue as a great country. It's impossible. So on Day One, my first act was to open up all of our oil fields. We're drilling like crazy. They've never been drilled like this. And I'm thrilled to announce today that we set a record last week for oil production. You see that? A record, by far. Never been set before. But we're opening up everything. That's why we won. Because we got elected to save America. And we're saving it.

And I have to tell you, unknown, the fake news media won't report this but things are changing fast. It's a disgrace. 25 years of Biden and the Democrats and they've done nothing but ruin our country. They ruined it. So today we're going to make a promise to the American people that if you don't get the job done within four weeks, then you will be out. And let me just say that in the case of the electric grid, there is no time left. We need the power back now. Every day that goes by without electricity is another day that Americans cannot go about their daily lives, including work, school, commerce, medicine. Electricity is essential to everything that we do. And as you know, last month alone, millions of Americans were unable to cook food for their families or sleep in their own homes. Millions of children did not have access to heat and hot water. Millions of families did not have air conditioning on sweltering days when the temperatures soared into the hundreds of degrees. No matter what the season, whether it's cold or hot, it doesn't matter. It's very important. We had a house where the family went to the grocery store, came home from the grocery store and the food in their refrigerator was spoiled. All right? That's no good. That's no good. And it shouldn't happen here. Our nation has become addicted to energy. We have to have energy. The Biden administration allowed China to buy every drop of oil and gas and coal that we could produce. Do you remember that? Remember that? And they wanted to save money. They didn't want to spend money on national security. So they said, "We're going to save some money. We're not going to buy any more coal." And we ended up losing 10% of our entire economy. Not only that, we lost $1 trillion. A hundred billion a year. A trillion dollars a decade. But we lost 10% of our GDP because we didn't buy enough fuel. That includes coal, oil and natural gas. So we were at 2%. We were a third world country. You wouldn't believe it. We went from being the richest country anywhere in the world to a third world country. Now we're the richest country anywhere in the world again. We're going to keep it that way too. And it's something that everyone should feel good

Hello unknown! What a crowd, what a beautiful crowd. Now, I want to talk about the economy. Now, under my administration, Americans are producing more, earning more, saving more, spending more, investing more, giving more, and they're living better than ever before. And that's not all. The unemployment rate is the lowest it's been in over 50 years. The inflation rate is the lowest it's been in over 40 years. That's important. For us too. We don't like high prices. And if you get back these idiots… And with all due respect, some of them are smart, but most of them are stupid as hell. If you put them back in, your country will be ruined. We are bringing our country back from the brink of ruin. We're making America great again. We inherited massive debts. In fact, our country had no money. Our country was dead broke when we came into office. But now, after many years, we've paid off all the money we borrowed. Do you remember? There was no money in our country. The money was being spent in other countries. Not anymore. We have a lot of money coming into our country. And if we weren't attacked by those crazy, incompetent terrorists from Iran, there would be even more money coming into our country right now. By the way, I'll tell you that. The Iranians have been defeated. You saw yesterday. They're finished. They were wiped out. So we took out their nuclear capability and then some. Think of how much money we save every year not having to worry about Iran. Instead of sending trillions of dollars overseas to pay interest on our debt, we're buying back US treasury bonds. That means every dollar invested in our treasury bonds is

We love unknown. We love the people of unknown. And we are going to win so big. Let me tell you about the economy and national security. 3,000 years ago, Americans were farmers, not bureaucrats. They were hunters, not lawyers. They were explorers, not social media influencers. This is what they wanted to be. That's what they wanted to be. For 243 years, America has been a nation that made things. We made things. But for the past eight long years, we've been a nation that just talked about making things. We've become a nation that just talks about making things. The Biden administration destroyed our energy industry. In other words, you would have no energy right now if I didn't take over. Your electricity bill was through the roof. Now your electricity bills are down by $300, $400, sometimes even more than that. And under the Trump economy, America is once again becoming the factory floor of the world. We're becoming the factory floor of the world. China and others used to do all the manufacturing and we don't allow them anymore. They use slave labor. They pay no taxes. They cheat on their currency, but we stopped it. We put tariffs on everybody. And when that happens, it forces them to raise their prices. In fact, with us, they're paying tremendous tariffs because they stole from us for many years. Now we're taking in trillions of dollars. We're going to take in this year, probably, $2 trillion or more. And the money goes back into our country. It pays off debt. It brings down interest rates. It does many different positive things, including bringing down inflation. Inflation is coming down. Food prices are way down. Grocery prices are way down. They went up during the last administration, then came way down. Under President Trump, grocery prices are the lowest they've been in decades. The cost of Thanksgiving dinner is lower than ever before. Housing affordability is the best it's been since 2021. So if you look at the numbers, 2021 was the worst of them all. If you look at the numbers, rent is the lowest it's been since 2014. Mortgage rates are the lowest they've been since 2009. You know why? Because I saved the housing market. It was going to crash, but I saved the housing market. And remember, I gave out hundreds of billions of dollars to

Go ahead. What's your question. Okay, so on that issue, let me be very clear about something. 25 years ago, our country was going down the tubes. We had no money in the Treasury. Our government was bankrupt and the world laughed at us. But I rebuilt it into a powerful machine with one of the strongest balance sheets anywhere in the world, by far. And you see what we're doing now. The markets are doing well because they know that the United States is strong again. So we have strength like nobody else has. We have tremendous military power, we have economic power. We have all sorts of power. And because we do, we can make these deals happen and we will. And if anybody thinks they're going to rip us off, they better think twice. Because that doesn't work anymore either. Look at Venezuela. We took over Venezuela because their president ripped off America. We took him out. We put our own person in there who's doing really well, actually. And he was given a very bad deal by somebody from another country. He called me and said, "Sir, I've been ripped off." And I said, "What did you do?" He says, "I signed a deal." And I said, "Where were you? Where were your people? Were you sleeping?" I mean, he's got a great future. He's going to turn out to be a fantastic president. But he's not happy right now. And we'll take care of that for him too. Anybody wants to rip us off, we don't want to be ripped off. It's a terrible thing when you get ripped off. That's why President Maduro in Venezuela went crazy. Because he got ripped off. And that happened during the Obama-Biden administration. If we didn't go in, he would have killed thousands of Americans. And that's why we went in. And we're bringing them back. I want to thank everybody for being here today. Thank you very much.. We had inflation, prices were going through the roof, energy was high, jobs were gone, wages were low, savings were destroyed, and our country was in deep trouble. We were losing. Now, we have more oil than any other nation in the world. We've got a lot of oil, we're bringing it in. And soon we'll be the biggest exporter too. For decades, Washington politicians let countries like China rip off American workers, cheat Americans, steal American technology, loot American factories, exploit American taxpayers, sell trillions of dollars' worth of weapons to the rest of the world while we got nothing. With these terrible trade deals, they gave away our future to other nations. And that's exactly what happened. That's why we have so many problems right now. Under President Trump, those days are over. My administration has secured the largest trade deal in history, the USMCA, and that was really the basis for everything. We signed the most beautiful deal with Japan. We just signed the best deal ever with South Korea. We have other deals coming along. And the one thing that we're not going to sign is a bad deal. If it takes time, we won't sign it. We'll stick with the old ones. We'll keep them until we get better ones. We also signed a phenomenal deal with Mexico, and we're going to sign a deal with Canada

And I said it at the time — I said it years ago — the economy and national security. And now look what happened. 12 months, we've had the best economy in history. We had the worst inflation in 48 years. Now you're seeing prices coming down, coming way down. They came way down last month and they'll come down some more this month. That's what I'm doing with energy. Energy is down by $1,000 a family right now. When I took over, oil was at 140. Today it's at $80. And when it gets to 60 or less, we're going to be able to say that our energy problem is solved. So I just want to thank everybody. It's an honor to be here. Thank you very much.. Well first of all, thank you for having me. And look, on trade, I was right from the very beginning. Everyone said I was wrong.  Now it's become a bipartisan issue. They're all talking about tariffs now. They were against them in the beginning, and now they want to use them themselves. So we have tremendous leverage over the people that have caused so much trouble. We've been ripped off by other countries for years and years and years. And as soon as I put the tariffs on, they came running back, wanting to make a deal. And we made some good deals. But if I didn't do what I did with the tariffs, we wouldn't be where we are today. The economy is unbelievable. It would not be what it is if I didn't do that. And remember when I put the tariff on steel and aluminum? Everybody said, "Oh, that'll never work." And now, China, every one of those companies wants to get a waiver because they can't afford to buy steel at the price. You can't build a car without steel, and you can't build a plant without aluminum. Every single one of these people who said, "That won't work," has called up my office begging for a waiver. So I think that's great, but they used us like a cash cow for many, many decades. And the only reason they got away with it is because of our politicians. They allowed this to happen, and they had no guts to stand up to them. And now they're coming back asking for waivers. They're asking for deals that are not going to be good for our country, and we're not gonna accept those deals. If you notice, every time there's an election, then they start getting tougher, and we don't give into their demands anymore. We take care of ourselves. And you know why? Because we won the World Cup. We won the World Cup. That's why. Look at this room. This is the greatest room ever. This is better than any ballroom anywhere. This is better than any ballroom. It really is. This is better than anything. You could put in a $1 billion dollar building, and you couldn't match this. Nobody can. Now, we're adding the second floor. It's going to be even bigger and better. We just started construction. But this room is incredible. We love it. You know why we love it? Because it reminds us that we're home. We love it because it reminds us that we're home. We're home, and we're going to make America great again. We will make America great again

Next question. Yes, you. About trade policy — I'll tell you, nobody knows this better than me. 47 years of business, they said I was a terrible businessman, and we've done a great job. But about trade, if you look at our numbers right now, we have the largest deficit that we've ever had with anybody in the history of our country, including China. It's actually much more than China, but they're the biggest, but it's much more than China. We're losing a tremendous amount of money. If you go back to four years ago, we had a very large surplus, and then they started coming in like crazy, and it's a shame because I think we should do better. And the only reason I say that is because I want to be able to make the deals better for us. The best way of making a deal better for us is when we're not losing trillions of dollars, or even billions of dollars. Now, we have no control over tariffs. I would love to lower the tariffs on China. They are too high, but the other side doesn't want to do anything about it. So, they don't care whether they pay $30 billion or $40 billion, so they won't do anything. We lose hundreds of millions of dollars every week, and it goes into their coffers and then they use that money to buy up companies here. There are many examples of that. So, I'd love to see the tariffs come down. If they came down, I could bring them down too. But as an example, we have a surcharge that we put on Chinese-made cellphones, which are sold by Apple. In other words, the phone is made there and sold by Apple, and that's okay, but they have a surcharge. Well, the iPhone people are complaining that they don't want to pay the surcharge. That's why they can complain. We get nothing out of that. We just lose money. But I'm willing to talk about bringing the tariff down, but they have to give us something back. So, I hope we can make that deal. We want to bring the price of drugs down. You know, drug prices are coming down. As of today, one year ago, the price of a brand-name drug was up 24%, today it's down 17%. We're getting them down. We've been getting them down for 10 months. Nobody else got them down for 50 years, and I got them down. They went up for 50 years, and they've never gone down. And the reason they

We're heading out now. But I want to say — what they are doing is a disgrace. Total disgrace. 45 years of peace, and we've been at war for the last four years because of them. And they should be ashamed. If you look at some of these places where they are shooting from, and they have no business being there, they have no business in our country. We don't want them here. They come into our country illegally and we do nothing about it. It's a disgrace that anybody would ever allow that to happen. So we will be coming back with the National Guard to get them out of here. But if they are not going to get out, then we will knock their ass off. And nobody wants that, but we don't want to see this anymore. This has got to stop. For the sake of all Americans, please, let us work together to make America great again. Thank you very much. We love unknown. We love the people of unknown. And we are going to win so big. Let me tell you about the economy and national security. 2020 was a year of soaring prices, inflation, and empty shelves. The Biden administration failed our country at every turn. They lost control over the border and then they destroyed our energy production. And now after four years of Joe Biden's policies, we have the worst inflation in history, the highest gasoline prices ever, the highest grocery prices ever, the lowest consumer confidence ever, the largest trade deficit ever, the largest budget deficit ever, the largest current account deficit ever, and the lowest investment returns ever. I don't know if that's good or bad. But I can tell you this, it is not good. But under my first year, I'm very proud to say, we've slashed inflation by 70% and gasoline prices by more than $2 a gallon, the largest price decline ever recorded. The stock market is up by 15%, and consumers are spending more on almost everything except for government services. In other words, they're spending their money on things that matter to them, like cars, furniture, appliances, travel, groceries, entertainment, and even charitable giving. Under my leadership, America has become an economic powerhouse again. Our country is now strong again. We are respected again, and we are prosperous again. We are a hot nation. We are a great nation. We are a free nation. Think of all the jobs we have created, the plants that have been built, the factories that have been expanded. You see it all over the country. Just take a look around, whether you're driving down the highway or flying across the sky. You see our country is booming. Nobody wants to be the one who kills the party. Nobody. Our economy is growing faster than any other major country in the world by far, including China. We grew last quarter by over 5%. That's what we need. We were just at 4% before. It's up to 5.5%, but it should go above five because we've got to grow much faster than that. That's what we do. That's what we want. We've added trillions of dollars in private sector investments. For example, since I took office, companies have announced plans to build more than 20,000 new manufacturing facilities. And as I promised during my campaign, we have ended the ridiculous electric vehicle mandates. We are terminating the ridiculous electric vehicle mandates. So if you buy an electric car today, that's fine. If you buy an ICE car, which most Americans prefer, that's also fine. You

This is a big day. A very big day for unknown. Because we are going to talk about making America great again. 47 years ago, on July the fourth of 1976, I was in Washington DC and I was watching the fireworks from a very high place, because you can see everything better. But it was on the National Mall. It was a great show, but it wasn't much compared to what we're going to be doing tonight, which will be really special. And I'm here today to celebrate our freedom with the greatest patriots anywhere on Earth, the American people. That's why I came back early from my trip, as you know, to South Korea. They love me over there. They love me in Japan. They love me all over Asia. But they love us too. We have a good relationship. As you probably heard, I just signed an incredible deal with Japan and other countries that makes them all happy. And they appreciate what we do. So I wanted to be here. And this is where we celebrate Independence Day. This year marks the 250th anniversary of the birth of the United States. This is a very important milestone. Our nation was founded by brave explorers who ventured across vast oceans and braved treacherous storms to seek out new lives in a land of liberty and prosperity. They came from everywhere, but they were Americans now. These fearless pioneers settled the vast wilderness of North America, forged communities from nothing, and built roads from the Atlantic to the Pacific. With each step, they carved their destiny in the soil of a continent they had discovered. They were strong. They were tough. They were smart. They were intelligent. And they created a legacy of strength and unity that endures to this day. On a clear summer evening more than two centuries ago, 12 proud men pledged their sacred honor to create a government of the people, by the people, and for the people. Their vision of democracy took root in the fertile fields of Pennsylvania and grew into a towering symbol of hope for millions throughout the world. For the first time, ordinary citizens were able to elect representatives of their own choosing to serve at the highest levels of power. The Constitution of the United States enshrined the ideals of liberty, equality, and justice under law. The Declaration of Independence proclaimed that all people are created equal and endowed with certain unalienable rights, including life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. And through the bloodshed of war and sacrifice of countless heroes, these principles were preserved and advanced for generations to come. Yet despite the challenges of the past few years, we remain steadfast in our belief

Hello unknown! What a crowd, what a beautiful crowd. Now, I want to talk about the economy. Nobody talks about this. 99% of the time, they're talking about everything else. The economy is doing better than it's ever done before, and that includes the Trump economy of 2016-2020. We had an amazing economy then. And now we have a better one. It was the best stock market in history. In fact, just before they closed today, we hit all-time highs on the stock market. You saw it. The NASDAQ, the S&P, the Dow Jones Industrial Average, all at new record levels. Today, for the first time in seven months, inflation has come down from 5%. That's great news, but even better news, core inflation came way down, much lower than anybody expected. That's good because if you bring prices down, things are going to be cheaper for everybody. They'll go up faster than any other president. They always say "Well, he said it's going to go up fast." Well, under President Trump, wages are going to go up faster than anything. Prices will go down so fast, people will be rich. We inherited a mess when we took over from the Biden administration, and we've turned it into something really special. Under Joe Biden, gasoline prices were sky high. Now they're lower than they've been in four years. Under Joe Biden, grocery store prices were skyrocketing. Now, with our brand-new Great Big Beautiful Bill, those prices are coming down fast. They're coming down so fast that you're not seeing anything like it. And remember, we won the election. Then we got sued by the Democrats who lost the election. We won every swing state, and they didn't win a single swing state. But we got sued, and that stopped us from doing anything for four long months while we defended ourselves in court. So we went from very low interest rates to very high interest rates because the Fed did that to us. And as soon as we won the case, we immediately cut interest rates, cut them way down, and the stock market soared. Every day, the stock market is soaring, setting record after record. Our tariffs have brought trillions of dollars back into our country. With the Great Big Beautiful Bill, we ended the ridiculous electric vehicle subsidy scam and redirected $500 billion to big, beautiful, gas-powered vehicles, cars, SUVs, trucks, pickups, vans, and motorcycles, including some Harley-Davidsons which I love, and many others too. No electric car can match the power, speed, reliability, or

We love unknown. We love the people of unknown. And we are going to win so big. Let me tell you about the economy and national security. 100 percent of all Americans will be able to buy the lowest cost health insurance in history within a few months of signing the great healthcare bill. I think that's fantastic, right? For more than four years, the Biden administration refused to use its authority to keep prescription drugs affordable for America. Now under President Trump, drug prices are coming down fast. By November of 2028, prescription drugs for most Americans will cost no more than $1 a day, which is a big deal. That is a big deal. They said it would never happen. You know what happened? Inflation has been cut by over two-thirds. The cost of eggs is now less than half of what they were just a year ago. That's the way it should be. That's the way it should be. If you want low energy costs, vote Republican. If you want high energy costs, vote Democrat. It's that simple. The United States is now the largest oil producer on planet Earth. And if we didn't have oil, our country wouldn't exist. But because of that, we don't have to rely on foreign countries for oil anymore. And in eight short months, we've produced more electricity from coal, natural gas, nuclear power, and renewable energy sources than ever before. That's incredible. Electricity is becoming much cheaper, cleaner, and more reliable. And this past month was the cheapest month for electricity in six years. That's an amazing thing when you consider that the price of electricity went up 70% during the Biden administration. Think of it, 70%. So with our energy dominance, we're slashing energy prices and making electricity far more affordable, and we have it very, very low. Under the previous administration, there was no border security. Illegal aliens poured into our country unchecked and unvetted from prisons, mental institutions, and jails all over the world. People came in through a southern border that nobody thought could ever be penetrated. Nobody. It couldn't even be penetrated. But with our new border policy, we're throwing them out faster and better than ever before. Nobody gets into our country unless they come in legally. Nobody. There's a lot of people standing behind us tonight who really appreciate that. In addition, we are keeping criminals off our streets. We are removing gang members and dangerous predators from our cities and towns. We're bringing back law enforcement, and we're getting America safe again. This is what we do. With Operation Lone Star, we've sent thousands of violent offenders packing home,

Well first of all, thank you for having me. And look, on trade, I was right from the very beginning. Everyone said I was wrong. 100% tariff would be terrible and nobody would ever do that. We did it with China, we're doing it with Japan, we're doing it with everybody else. They have to give us a fair deal. The people in this room know more about tariffs than anybody in the world by far. You've done much better than anybody in the world because if you weren't successful, you wouldn't be sitting here today. So we have a trade war going on, but it's not necessarily bad. It's actually good. It's good because we want to make sure that our country is protected and our citizens are protected. And we have been ripped off like no other. Other presidents haven't taken care of us properly. But we have a very strong president that loves our people and he takes care of them and he does everything within his power to protect them. And so we have to take care of ourselves. And so, it is unfortunate, it doesn't mean it has to be bad. A lot of things that President Trump has put into place, I think he could have maybe handled differently. But ultimately they've been positive, even though some have been negative. But again, the fact that we have a president who cares deeply for our country and wants to make America great again is what counts. We can always tweak some things, but overall, when you look at the bigger picture, he's done an amazing job. And it's really incredible. I'm very proud to stand behind him. Thank you, guys. President Trump : I think we have a lot of people in here, but I'm going to ask everybody to keep it as quiet as possible because they are working on sound. We'll be able to hear each other better that way. But we've had… I thought the shutdown was horrible, and I said so at the time. We settled the whole thing within three weeks, and I think we could have done it for nothing if we were smart. I don't want to see it happen again, but I can tell you this, the Democrat policy is bad policy. They make no money off of having these people work. In fact, they actually lose money. It's very bad, not good. And they really are hurting the people. If we did this deal and we didn't settle with them, it would have been catastrophic. So it wasn't just that we made a deal, we had to make a deal. The Democrats wouldn't even negotiate, by the way, despite what you read. They didn't want to talk about anything. I asked to meet with them many times, and they said, "No, sir." But we made a deal and we saved the country from an economic disaster that would have happened. So I'd say that's pretty big. That's a big one. I also settled eight wars around the world, and we got peace in the Middle East. There's never been anything like it. Think of it, Israel and Palestine now living side-by-side. No more bombs, no more rockets, no more missiles. All we need there is peace. We've given them everything they wanted. Everything they wanted. You know what that is? We gave up all land and we gave up our military. We gave up everything. They still attacked us once, and we blew the hell out of their missile factory. We wiped it out. That's why there's no city on Earth where more people want to live

And now we have the hottest country anywhere in the world right now. The hottest. We have the hottest country. Energy production is through the roof. Gasoline is under $2 per gallon. In some states it's under $1.50. It's the lowest price since 2020. Prices are down. Inflation is down. Prices are way down. They're coming down fast. That's why we have the biggest rally. In fact, they say it's the biggest rally ever in Washington DC, but we don't want to brag too much. We're very humble people. As soon as I took over, we were up $1 trillion and we're going to keep getting better and better. Okay? Good luck. Thank you very much. It's an honor. Thank you very much. Thank you very much. Hello unknown! What a crowd, what a beautiful crowd. Now, I want to talk about the economy. Nobody talks about this. 12 months ago, our country was dead and we had no hope. And now we have record-setting numbers on growth, record-setting numbers on investment in AI and AI factories, record-setting numbers on jobs and wages. It's the greatest economy anywhere in the world by far. Our stock market is setting all-time highs. That's why when I see these people at the State Department who say, "Oh, you're driving up inflation." No, they're driving up inflation because of bad policy. We're bringing down inflation like nobody has seen since 1981. We inherited that from Biden. But think of it, one year ago, we were dead. They said we'd never make it. The markets crashed. But within one year, we went from zero to $9 trillion added to our stock market. That's an incredible number. Nobody's ever seen anything like it. We created more than four million new jobs in just 11 months. We've got trillions of dollars pouring into our country from places like China and Japan. We're leading China and everybody else in artificial intelligence by far. We're leading them by a lot, and we're not going to let anybody take away our lead. We're leading China by a lot. But as soon as I took office, I immediately ended Joe Biden's insane electric car mandate that would have put millions of Americans out of work, caused energy prices to skyrocket, killed the auto industry, and left us with fewer cars to drive for years. We don't need electric cars. We want clean cars, but we want to be able to afford them. So if you go back before me, it was Obama-Biden who did the worst job of any administration ever on the economy. Their eight-year period was the worst eight-year period of any administration in the history of our country. If you go back further, it was actually Hillary Clinton, where she decimated our country with terrible trade deals. And we're getting those trade deals fixed. In other words, our trade deals are now great. If you look at Canada, if you look at Mexico, if you look at Japan, if you look at South Korea, if you look at Australia, if you look at Singapore, if you look at India, if you look at the European Union, if you look at NATO, if you look at Switzerland, if you look at Norway, if you look at Venezuela, if you look at Colombia, if you look at Brazil, if you look at Argentina, if you look at Peru

I've already answered that. The answer is very clear. Gasoline prices are down from over four dollars to $3.09 right now. I would say the biggest thing, with everything else being so good, our stock market has set record after record, all-time highs. But if you take just the S&P, which is considered by most people as a barometer, it's up 13% in one year and 19% in two years, despite everything that's happening in the world. And other markets around the world are doing very well also. The fact that our stock market is doing really well speaks volumes about our economy and how much confidence there is in the United States. Speaker 1 : President Trump, what do you think of Elon Musk's reported plans to charge Twitter users? Do you want to see him break up Twitter? Donald Trump : No, I don't think he should break up Twitter. If he wants to charge, maybe they'll make money. They lost billions of dollars last year, hundreds of millions every week. So I hope he makes money, but I think he'd be a great chairman. He's a genius. You know that. He's got tremendous vision. He's done a lot of good things for the country and the world. I hope he does well. Speaker 1 : What did you learn from your meeting with Iran's foreign minister yesterday? Donald Trump : Well, I learned that they were nice people, that they're smart people, but they're not going to give us our hostages back. It's just not going to happen. They're not going to do it. They're not going to do it no matter what happens. There's nothing I could do or not do to get them to do it. And I'm very disappointed. But I thought the meeting itself was good. We had a long talk. They came here because I said, "You can come here." They wanted to meet in Switzerland. I said, "No, you come here," because I felt it was more appropriate. We had a long talk. They asked me questions. They gave me answers. But we'll never agree on getting our hostages back. That's something that's gone. I mean, it's like it was seven, eight weeks ago. It's

We love unknown. We love the people of unknown. And we are going to win so big. Let me tell you about the economy and national security. 100% of my economic agenda is about making America strong, making America prosperous, making America free again. That's what I'm doing for the country, that's what I've done. It was a mess when they left, but it was really a mess. The Biden administration gave us the worst inflation in history, which cost families hundreds of dollars every month on their utility bills, groceries, gas, everything. They also put millions of people out of work by creating one of the most restrictive regulatory burdens ever inflicted on any nation anywhere in the world. And our energy grid was decimated with the worst power outage in history. For eight months, many Americans were paying the highest electric prices of all time. That doesn't happen. We have the largest economy in the world, strongest military in the world. But Joe Biden caused the biggest price hike in history. Under his Green New Scam plan, energy became unaffordable for everyone. You know that, right? And now, under President Trump, electricity costs are down over 20%, gasoline is at its lowest level in over two years, and food prices are falling like crazy. We're bringing them way down. And we will soon be paying less for eggs than we did last year. The Democrats destroyed our electrical grid. I restored it in six weeks. And now, we have the greatest electrical grid in the world. I guess you heard that. I fixed it. No other president could do this. No Democrat can fix anything. They just destroy. I fixed it. It's the greatest electrical grid anywhere in the world. In fact, there's no electrical grid that even comes close. And now, if we have bad weather or an attack, we don't lose power anymore. We never lose power anymore. Our electrical grid is incredible. So, after four years of Obama-Biden, American families had no savings and their futures were uncertain. They were unsure of what they wanted to do. Today, wages are rising fast and savings are growing, and job growth is booming. We inherited a disaster. We inherited a real disaster. Over the past three months, we have created more jobs than the entire Biden administration created in four years. Think of that. If Biden had kept those policies going for another term, unemployment would be sky high and inflation through the roof. And that's exactly what we had before we took office. That's exactly what we had. And now, thanks to the Trump accounts, every single child has money waiting for them when they turn 18.

They would come here through Biden's open border policy, and we took them out. We got them out fast. We got them out fast. We put them in jail, and we threw them the hell out. That's the good news. But they shouldn't even be in our country. We shouldn't even take them. And we did that twice. First time I ran. I stopped that, stopped a lot of it. Second time around, I've stopped it altogether. But when you see this stuff happening, like the woman who killed her husband and she's out. She's out. And she killed her son too, actually. She killed her son, killed

Because we are going to talk about making America great again. 10 months ago, we inherited a disaster caused by incompetent leadership and radical left wing lunatics that destroyed our country and made it unaffordable for the average American family. But now we're back on track, and you're going to see things happen like nobody's ever seen before. We've got a lot of different topics today, but I want to just start off by thanking everybody here in this room. This is a historic location and a great honor. And I want to thank Tom Barrack. Great business leader. He's had tremendous success in his life. Very successful. And he's a friend of mine for many years. And I have to tell you, unknown, the fake news media won't report this but things are changing fast. It's a disgrace. 12 years of Democrat policy and Biden was not a good president. He was an incompetent president. He was a bad president and we're bringing our country back from disaster. And the stock market is doing so well, they can't even believe it. They say that's impossible. But the fact is we've never had a better stock market than we do right now because people see what we're doing with the economy. The best growth in history. We have the best numbers ever recorded for growth, which means that interest rates should be coming down like crazy and they're coming down anyway. And we're going to bring them way down. And that's why prices are also coming down. So everything's working together. You don't have inflation when you have high interest rates. And we have the opposite of that. We have low interest rates, high growth and no inflation. We will have no inflation. We'll get it out of here. And it's amazing how fast it came up and how quickly it could come down. If you look at Europe, they have much higher energy prices. That's why their inflation is very high. In fact, their inflation rate has been about twice as high as ours and it's coming down. Ours is already coming down. We got it down below two. We want to get it to zero or less than one if possible. We think that's achievable, and we want to get it there before the end of the year. And we did great on housing. Great. And on the border, we're doing great. We stopped 19,000 gang members from entering into our country illegally, 19,000. And we have the strongest borders in American history. We have the strongest borders by far. When we took over, we had a border where anybody could come through. And they were coming through from prisons, mental institutions all over the world. They were coming through drug dealers. The worst of the worst. People that were murderers and rapists and thieves. Now we have only people that come in legally. We let people come in legally, we take care of them and we take them away from wherever they're from and we put them into our system. And we have the strongest borders ever, ever. And nobody wants to admit that. We have the strongest borders ever, ever. And the southern border is a lot safer now. A lot safer. And when we catch somebody, they go back home. And we take them out immediately. And we take them to jail.

Well first of all, thank you for having me. And look, on trade, I was right from the very beginning.
