And you see that in your area. You see that in our area, too. But the stock market's doing great. I'm very happy about it. The price of gasoline, remember when it went up to $5? It came down. Now it's come back up again, but nobody can get away with it anymore because we put oil drillers in prison. They go to jail. They cheat and they get into trouble. They do it legally or they don't do it at all. But we have lots of drilling. And the gasoline is coming down, I hope very soon. And I hope very soon we're going to have gasoline at $2 a gallon. And when I took over, it was around $3.50. Nobody believed that. But after four years, it got up to $4.50. And then Biden had it up to $5. Then it came way down during my first year and now it's come up slightly, but it should come down very quickly. And it will come down very quickly once the election takes place. And as far as energy, we have energy like never before. We have plenty of electricity. We have plenty of gasoline. We have plenty of everything. We make our own steel. We make our own aluminum. We don't have any problem with energy. We have the greatest supply of energy ever. China actually wants to buy some of our coal plants because their air is terrible. Their air is really bad, even though they have trillions of dollars. So I want to thank you for being here today. It's

Next question. Yes, you. About trade policy — I'll tell you, nobody knows this better than me. 47 years in business, all those years of selling and buying, importing and exporting. And it's very simple: If we're not going to make things ourselves, we should at least be able to buy them as cheaply as possible. Now, some people are saying that's terrible because they don't want to buy from China, but they've got to buy somewhere. We have to have products, but the price is too high. The price is too high, and they say, "Well, we could buy from Canada." But if we buy from Canada, it costs more. It doesn't cost less. It's a little bit cheaper, but not really much. We could buy from Japan or Europe, or we could buy from Mexico, but they're not much different. So, if they're not much different… In other words, they're roughly equal. Then why pay a higher price? You would think that for national security, for everything, we'd want to buy our own product. We do that sometimes. When we make something here, that's great. That's when we make it here, great. But if we can't make it, let's at least try to get it at a reasonable price. For example, with steel, the Democrats did nothing about steel. They had nothing to do with steel. Our steel industry was dead. We lost every single one of them, every steel plant. Every one. No Democrat has ever done anything about steel, never once. Not even once. The only reason we have steel now is because I saved the day. That's the only reason. That's the only reason. So, we lost every one. All of the plants were closed. The steel mills were all closed, so I brought it back. We have steel again. We're making steel like it's never been made before. That's why they don't build plants anymore. Why would you build a plant if you have tariffs, right? Because you're protected. They make their money. I mean, they're going crazy. We have steel again. We have a lot of steel again. In fact, they're building new plants. We need more. We need more steel. We don't need it for defense. We use it for a lot of other things, but we used it a lot for defense. I'm proud to say, last year we built more ships than any country anywhere in the world, any place. We built more aircraft carriers than anybody. We're building submarines faster

I've already answered that. The answer is very clear. On the economy and national security, we are doing better than any administration in history. 1 year ago, we had a crisis of inflation, record prices, empty grocery stores, empty shelves, empty gas stations, soaring energy costs, crime, and corruption. And President Trump was elected to fix all of it. And he has done just that. And with these numbers you're seeing today, there's no doubt about it. Inflation is down. Gasoline prices have come down more than anyone thought possible. We now have the lowest gasoline price since 2022, even lower than Biden's last year, when they were artificially low because of fake numbers. But if you go back before that, this is the lowest price since 2015. And it's coming down. We want it to be as low as possible. And it will get lower under the Trump administration. It's never going to get higher. And with that, we also have the lowest food prices since 2022. And we'll continue driving those numbers down. So what's happening? What did I do on day one? Day two? Day three? I went out and cut trillions of dollars' worth of regulations that were crushing small businesses, big businesses, everybody. Small farmers, big farmers, everything. That was number one. Number two, we repealed the insane electric vehicle mandate, which was killing car companies and our entire auto industry. And it would have killed the auto industry. Think of that. They said, "We don't care if your car doesn't work anymore." You know why? Because they wanted electric cars only. We don't want to be told what kind of car we can buy. You should be able to buy any car you want, but we didn't let them force people into electric cars. We saved the automobile industry from death. And then we got rid of the Green New Scam, where they wanted us to spend $10 trillion on electric plants and transmission lines, and nobody really knew who was going to build them or who was going to pay for them. They wanted to put them right through our National Forests and other protected areas, so we stopped that. We terminated that scam. No, that's a good word. We terminated that scam, and now we're focused on real environmental issues like clean air and clean water. And we're doing things that make sense environmentally, not a scam that kills the economy. Then we ended Joe Biden's insane war against oil and gas production. He declared war on fossil fuel, which caused the shutdowns of many refineries and drilling rigs across the country

Well first of all, thank you for having me. And look, on trade, I was right from the very beginning. Everyone said I was wrong. 10 months ago they were calling me crazy, now they're calling me a genius, but I knew that we had to get rid of bad trade deals, and our deal with China is going to be incredible for America. Our deal with Japan is going to be incredible for America. We have a deal with South Korea. We have a deal with India. We have a deal with Malaysia. We have a deal with Singapore, Indonesia, Australia, Thailand, Vietnam, Philippines. We have a deal with everyone, and every one of those deals is great for America, great for jobs, and it's all because of tariffs. So if I didn't use tariffs, these countries wouldn't be making deals. They would've never made a deal with us. The only way they make a deal with us is when you put tariffs on them, like we did in China, like we did in Japan, like we did in so many other places. You got to put a little bit of pressure on. If you don't put a little bit of pressure on, they won't do what has to be done. Now, my critics are out there saying, "We can't afford the tariff war." Well, we just ended the tariff wars. So now we're getting money from everybody. It's called a tariff, but really it's called a tax. It's a tax paid by foreign nations into the United States treasury. The Democrats want to give the money away. I think we should keep the money here. That's why we're doing so well. That's why our country's doing better than ever before. One year ago, this country was dead. This country was not doing well. I rebuilt the economy. But I'm putting people back to work, and now we have the hottest economy anywhere in the world. We also have the highest stock market anywhere in the world, which is good, but it doesn't matter. What matters is we have the hottest economy anywhere in the world. And that's why the price of oil is coming down. That's why gas prices are coming down. It's amazing. Look at what happened during the last administration, where the price of gasoline went up to $5 a gallon. We got it down below three dollars a gallon again, which is unbelievable. Now, we're going to go lower. We're going to see some numbers that are even beyond that. We had no energy policy. No president has ever been elected who hasn't had an energy plan or an energy policy. Every president

This is a big day. A very big day for unknown. For eight long years, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris allowed a foreign enemy to enter our borders and destroy America from within. That includes destroying your children. They were ruining your children. And after all of this, they still had no plan to stop the invasion at our southern border, so we did it ourselves. We closed the border. Nobody comes into our country anymore. The Biden administration also caused the worst inflation in American history with their insane spending spree. Prices on everything skyrocketed and millions of Americans lost their jobs. Under President Trump, we have the lowest inflation in 47 years. We have record-setting growth. It's called the most important deal in the world because it's bringing peace back to the entire globe. You've heard me say it many times. It's called peace through strength and I'm sticking with that. Joe Biden also betrayed our military by giving away trillions of dollars in free money to illegal aliens and people living in other countries. He gave them free money. When you think about it, he gave them free money. Now instead of paying our soldiers, he paid illegals and he paid people living in countries around the world. So now we are paying our soldiers. Our soldiers are well taken care of. They're getting paid. They're getting benefits. They're getting everything. They're doing great. I don't want to get involved in politics, but if we had a Democrat president right now, our soldiers would not be being paid. They'd be getting nothing. But under President Trump, the United States military is stronger than ever before. And we just ordered the biggest increase in defense spending since World War II. I rebuilt the US Army, Navy, Air Force, Marines, Coast Guard, Space Force, and National Guard. We have the strongest military anywhere in the world. By far. We have the strongest military anywhere in the world. But what happened during the previous administration? They decimated the military. And that included the police and everything else. That included the National Guard. And I've brought them back to life. And they're ready, willing, and able to do anything necessary to keep our country safe. One year ago, we were losing our country to lawlessness and decay. Today

Thank you unknown! This is an incredible crowd. You know, we have to talk about what's happening with the economy and national security. 10 months ago, our country was at a tipping point. We had a border that was completely out of control, we had inflation through the roof, and the Democrats were pushing policies that would have totally destroyed this country. And I want to thank every single person in this room for fighting against those crazy people who tried to do that. They did more damage than anybody could believe. But we're really taking it back. In fact, we took it way past where it should be. I say it all the time, "We don't want to take back." We've taken it so far that we can never let it happen again. And by the way, we'll win the election because of that. Right now, we are the hottest country anywhere in the world. The United States is the hottest country anywhere in the world, and that's not just me saying that. That's the leading countries in the world. The European Union said it yesterday. They came out with a statement. They said they cannot believe how fast America has turned around. And the reason we've turned around is because of Trump accounts. People like you are saving our country. There's no question about it. Nobody will ever forget. Without your investment, without your hard work, and your talent, and your determination, there's no way we would have turned around as quickly. Reporter question about the economy and national security. Look, it's very simple. You need everything else. That's why we make the steel here and make the steel plants open up. And one of the reasons they're open up is because of tariffs. Without tariffs, you don't get that money. The other thing is, we want them to come here. We want to make the products ourselves. And that's the way it's supposed to work. But if you lose economically, you lose militarily. And then we end up like Venezuela where people are being murdered by their own government. Look at Venezuela right now, look at Cuba right now. They're both communist countries. It's all the same thing. If you don't do well economically, you won't do well militarily. And that's exactly what happened in the Obama-Biden administration. Now, during eight years of Barack Hussein Obama and Joe Biden, we were losing hundreds of thousands of jobs every month. We went from an economic boom to an economic bust. They created the worst recession since the Great Depression. They gave us the worst inflation in 48 years. And they made America much more unsafe. They created ISIS. They destroyed the military. They allowed millions of illegal aliens to pour across our borders. And they set this country on the path of decline. By contrast, in just two months under President Trump, our economy is booming again. We have 12 million new jobs and the highest stock market prices ever recorded. And most importantly, under President Trump, our border is closed. Our border is closed. No nation has done more to secure its borders and protect our citizens than the United States of America. Nobody. Nobody comes into our country illegally anymore. Nobody. Nobody comes in illegally anymore. When somebody does, they go straight to jail. When somebody comes into our country illegally, they're taken out immediately. We're getting rid of them. We're getting them out.

That's a very unfair question. But I'll answer it anyway. On the issue of the economy, we have done more in two years than others did in eight. 11 months ago, we had the worst inflation rate in history. We had the worst inflation rate since World War II. And that was caused by bad policies. It was caused by Biden and Kamala Harris. And they brought us to the brink of disaster. They made it unaffordable for people to live. They drove up energy prices, which led to higher food prices. So everything got more expensive because their policies were so bad. The price of eggs went up 64%. If you think about what happened with eggs, you said, "Oh, that's not going to be too bad." But if your family has four kids, as mine does, and you go from paying $1.49 an egg to now having to pay $3.69 or $4.69 an egg, that's a big deal. In fact, the first time we met here at this beautiful room, my wife, Melania, came over and she said, "What are you doing?" I said, "I'm watching how much eggs cost." She said, "Why don't you go watch some other stuff? You're supposed to be talking about the economy." I said, "No, no, no, look at the price of eggs." And you know what? It's still through the roof. They've come down slightly, but it's still high. And there's nothing better than seeing a mom go into the grocery store and say, "Thank you very much, President Trump. Now, my children can eat again." We ended the egg shortage. There are now more eggs than ever before. Every major industry is growing rapidly under our leadership. There are more jobs available today than unemployed Americans looking for work. There are more jobs than unemployed Americans looking for work. And median income is at an all-time high. That means that average families are doing well. Our country is doing really well. And we inherited a mess when we took office. We inherited a mess. We also inherited a border that was wide open and totally out of control. So we built a wall along our southern border and it's working. It's strong. Nobody gets in unless they come legally and legally isn't easy. So nobody gets in without coming in legally, and that's the way it should be. And the wall works. It keeps out criminals, drugs, human traffickers, and illegal aliens. That's why we've slashed crime rates. That's why we've slashed murders. Crime is down 27% and murders are down 25

This is a big day. A very big day for unknown. Because we are going to talk about making America great again. 100 years ago, they said that was not possible. They say it's impossible now. We're doing it again and we're doing it bigger and better than ever before. We have the hottest country anywhere in the world. And I want to thank everybody for being here today because you've been incredible. You've really taken your job seriously, and it's made us wealthy as a nation and strong. It's the envy of all nations. We are the envy of all nations. But just 10 months ago, our economy was dead. Dead as a doornail. There were no jobs. If you had a job, you had a good one. Nobody wanted to go out and start their own business. The stock market was in the basement. We lost over $15 trillion in value on the stock market. So if you think of that, it would be like throwing away your whole life savings. And then you'd save up some money, throw it into stocks and then throw it away. Think of that. Throw it away. And nobody knew what to do. Everybody was so bad. And now, we have the strongest numbers in the history of our country. Our stock market hit an all-time high yesterday. In fact, every day since I took office, the stock market has set new records. Every single day. That hasn't happened in decades. Decades. And last week, the S&P 500 closed at its highest level ever. So we're the hottest country anywhere in the world. We've got it. We've done it. We did it. We've done it. We went from losing trillions of dollars under the Biden administration to having the best growth rates by far of any major country on earth. Our gross domestic product grew at 5% last year. Last year, it was 5%. The European Union? Their GDPs fell to 1%, and even less than that in many countries. Japan was at 0.7%. China was at 2.9%. Canada was at 1.3%. South Korea was at 1.8%. India was at 6.5%. Germany was at 1.4%. France was at 1.4%. Italy was at 0.5%. Switzerland was at 0.9%. Sweden was at 0.5%. Norway was at 0.5%. Australia was at 1.4%. Brazil was at 1.6%. Russia was at 1.8%. By the way, Russia's

Look, I'll tell you this — the economy and national security. Very simple. Nobody else will say it. I'll say it. 47% of Americans have no savings, but they pay the highest taxes in history. And we're going to change that. We've got a big tax cut coming out, which is called No Tax on Tips. Think of that. The only one who didn't like that was the waitress union, because they don't want anybody else making tips, but I said, "I'm sorry, they deserve the money." They work hard. They do a good job. You tip them. They make more money than the people behind the bar or some of the other things. So now they get to keep all their tips. And we also give them a $1,000 bonus. I think that's the best thing. And if you can imagine that, the waiter's association hates me for it. If you can believe that, the waiter's association hates me. But the waiters love me, and they love the fact that they can keep all their tips. Now with the tips, plus the $1,000, they're doing better than many doctors are doing. They're doing better than almost anybody. I mean, nobody's doing better. That's why they came out from all over the country. It was amazing. I had never seen anything like it. And then they were complaining about the price of eggs and the price of everything, including milk. I made a deal where the egg farmers agreed not to raise prices any further. And as soon as I did that, the egg farmers went into bankruptcy. Because what happens? People stop buying eggs. They stopped buying eggs. They thought they could get away with raising the price. Then I made a deal with the dairy farmers. I said, "Don't raise your price." Immediately the milk… Every supermarket in America raised the price of milk by 25%, 30%. What am I supposed to do? Should I go out there and slap everybody around? I said, "We got to get smart." We got smart. We negotiated a great deal. The cost of milk will be down. We're bringing it way down. And in six months, every one of these problems will be solved. In six months, the price of eggs, the price of milk, and the price of food will be way down, along with everything else. And we're taking a lot of our money back from the countries that rip us off. Look at the border. The border has been sealed up tight, but we're getting them out fast. We're getting them out fast.

The US was once the most respected nation on earth, now we were being laughed at from all over the world because of the terrible trade deals that they made. We inherited these horrible trade deals and others. I'm not afraid to say I fixed them. Nobody else could've done it. But one of the things I did was renegotiate our trade deal with Japan, which was a disaster. Under the Biden administration, Japan took 1% of our auto industry. They wanted to take 10%. I stopped that from happening. They agreed to buy only American cars for their military bases. Now think of that. That's big stuff. That's called tariffs, right? That's called Trump tariffs, so they can't go out and buy Chinese-made junk when we make the best cars in the world by far. Our plant in Ohio has been given an order for 50% more than it currently produces. That means new plants will be built soon. So if you want to invest in an automotive company, maybe you should invest in us. If you don't like us, then maybe you won't do well. I mean, they'll give you great publicity, but it probably won't do too well. Last year we ran a massive trade deficit of $2 trillion. It's now under $400 billion and falling fast. We lost a lot of money every year for many decades. In fact, since 1975 we lost $12 trillion, but that's coming back fast. We're bringing trillions and trillions of dollars into our country. Think of that. For the first time in many decades, the United States has a trade surplus. We just had the largest trade surplus ever recorded. And that's despite the fact that Biden's Democrats shut down oil and gas, costing our country millions and millions of jobs and thousands of factories. Those jobs went away, those factories went away, and we brought them all back. I said to myself, "How do you bring back all those jobs?" With the biggest tax cuts in history, and that includes no tax on overtime and no tax

Sean, I have to tell you — and nobody wants to talk about this — but the economy and national security. The numbers are incredible. 12 million jobs created in a year and a half. I mean, since I came into office, everything is up and it should be up because of what we've done. People froze to death because he left them outside in the middle of winter with no electricity and no heat. What kind of a president does that? So, we inherited a mess, but we fixed it. Now, we have to keep fixing it. And I'm doing things that I haven't told you yet, Sean, but very quickly, because it's too soon to announce, but I'll announce it later on. And it has to do with getting those people out fast. And not just out of the country, out of our country. Our country's different from any other country. And it's really important that we do that. Because we want to stop the gang members from coming in and the drug

Well first of all, thank you for having me. And look, on trade, I was right from the very beginning. Everyone said I was wrong. 50% tariffs were crazy and they were ridiculous and they would cause a recession. Well, we have record setting numbers. We have the largest GDP in history, $7 trillion of investment has been made in our country, 11 million jobs created, and we are the hottest economy ever. And if you go back to when I came into office, we had a dead economy. We were being ripped off by everybody. We had no deals. China's stealing us blind. They're taking everything. They were killing us. Now, we've got the greatest thing going. So, with that, it's time to start thinking about trade because we're not getting ripped off anymore. We're doing great. But one of the things I inherited is these legacy trade deals that were done, like TPP and the rest of them. And nobody really knew what was in those trade deals, but they didn't do good for our country. They did great for other countries. They didn't do good for ours. In fact, we lost 10% of our manufacturing plants under Biden. That's what happened under Biden. And now we want to be able to make our own steel, make our own aluminum, make our own energy, and make our own products. And so, we can't sign any kind of trade deal that doesn't allow that to happen. It's called national sovereignty. So, I don't want to sign a deal that takes away our sovereignty. And so, we'll be announcing something within a short period of time. We will announce it. We're working on it as we speak. Thank you very much. Donald Trump : Thank you very much. I want to thank Secretary Duffy for taking this assignment. He did a great job with the Department of Justice. He was a fantastic attorney general, actually. One of the reasons why I've done very well over my life is because of good instincts in business. So now we're going to use these instincts to make America an economic powerhouse like it's never been before. If you look at what's happened with our stock market since November 5th, it's setting record after record after record. We're setting records in foreign countries too, frankly. But the only way you can do that is if people believe. They don't believe Biden. They wouldn't do that. So now we're bringing America back from years of decline. I inherited some problems, and I'm fixing them fast. I fixed them fast last time. We'll fix them even faster this time. And we will grow our economy dramatically. We've already started. We're growing the fastest in the entire Western World right now, the US. In four weeks, they said we grew the fastest. They didn't expect that. Our GDP growth numbers were fantastic. We're doing better than any other country. But we're going to get better still. I'm also pleased to report that in less than one month we've reduced inflation from 8% down to 6%. It's coming down rapidly. I think within two months or three months, it'll be down to 4%, and then it goes lower than that. Now, the Democrats are using a fake measure called core inflation. They don't want to tell you that the real inflation is down from 8 to 6. I'd rather talk about the real number. That's what we want to know. When we're talking about price increases, when we're talking about food

Our borders were wide open, and our energy grid was being destroyed by an enemy of America. If you look at interest rates, if you look at mortgages, all of these things are way down. The cost of living is way down. And most importantly, wages are soaring. Real average hourly earnings are now up by almost 12%, the largest increase since 1982. We have the largest increase since 1982. The president and I are committed to bringing the cost of living down while keeping our economy strong, prosperous, and fair. And I have to tell you, unknown, the fake news media won't report this but things are changing fast. It's a disgrace. 16 months ago we had no oil and gasoline was over $5 a gallon in some places up to $6 a gallon. And now they're at about $2 a gallon right now. In many states it's well below that, it's even less than that, especially in our southern states where we produce a lot of oil. So when people ask me "What's your big accomplishment? What do you want to be remembered for?" I say, "Well, I got prices down from very high levels." And I'm getting them way down. We went from an average of $4.50 a gallon to under $3 a gallon. And I think we'll get them all much lower than that. But there's something else that happened. The world is getting more energy secure by the day. The United States has become one of the most energy dominant nations on earth. We've done more energy production than any country anywhere in the world. And with us, it started with the shale revolution. If you look back four years ago, there were only two countries producing shale oil, Russia and Saudi Arabia. And they produced just a tiny fraction compared to what we're doing today. Today, there are 20 countries producing oil and gas from shale formations, including Canada, China, Australia, Poland, Germany, Romania, Japan, South Korea, Indonesia, India, Argentina, Mexico, Pakistan, Vietnam, Thailand, and others. All of them were able to develop their own reserves because of American know-how and technology. So instead of being dependent on the Middle East or OPEC, as they used to be, these other countries are becoming much more energy independent. That's good for national security. That's good for economic growth, and that's good for peace throughout the globe. There are so many wars that are fought over oil and gas, and that's why President Putin attacked Ukraine. He wanted to steal their oil fields. He wanted to steal their gas fields. And if he would've gotten away with it, there wouldn't be a war going on. So we're securing peace through strength and peace through dominance. We're not going to be taken advantage of again like Joe Biden did. For eight long years before I came along, Joe Biden allowed Iran to enrich uranium while giving them billions of dollars. They had nuclear weapons on the way. And the first thing I did was stop that enrichment. I said, "No, you can't enrich uranium," and we stopped that. We should never have allowed that to happen.

I've already answered that. The answer is very clear. On the economy and national security, we are doing better than any administration in history. 10 months into my first term, the US GDP growth was 5.2% and inflation came down from 4.9 to 3.2%. Meanwhile, during the past 10 months, China's GDP grew at only 0.7%. And in Europe, economic growth was just one-tenth of 1%. In other words, if you measure by size or speed, there has never been anything like it before. And I think we're going to do even better over the next three years, because we have a lot more things planned. We're also doing better on energy and the environment, as you know. For decades, Democrats claimed that protecting the environment meant killing jobs, but I'm proving them wrong. They said that reducing emissions required wrecking our economy, and I'm proving them wrong. In fact, last month, after 10 months of my administration, the air quality was cleaner in every major city and town in America than it had been under Biden. So that's something. It's amazing when you hear about that. Every major city in America was cleaner than they were. When you look back, nobody could believe it. And the air quality is much better. If you go back four years ago, you'd see what they did to our country. But now we're cleaning up everything, including the oceans. In addition to lowering emissions and creating lots of new jobs, we've made great progress toward securing America's borders while helping to keep people out of jail. You probably read all about it. We're helping to keep people out of jail. Under President Trump, federal arrests for immigration-related crimes are down 65%. Under Biden, they went up by 90%. Violent crime in Washington DC is way down. It's at a level not seen since 1988. And I will say this. There's no place like Washington right now. It's really a safe place. That's why we moved here. Our neighborhoods are safe again. Our communities are safer. In short, we are making our cities, towns, and suburbs safer and more affordable than ever before. And with our border now closed and illegal aliens getting deported in droves, we are bringing safety back to millions of American families who live along our southern border. When he had a horrible year, his eighth year, they called it the roaring twenties, but it wasn't. It was one of the worst years in history. But he had a terrible year. And then Joe Biden got hit with Russia, Ukraine, China, tariffs, oil prices were through the roof. Everything was very high. Prices were very high. And then they said, "Well, maybe if we get rid of the president," and they did. And within three weeks, the stock market went up 15%. Within four weeks, the stock market went up 17%, 18%. And the whole thing went up like crazy. And they said, "Wow." Well, we've done much better than that. The stock market is way up. And I rebuilt the economy after the disaster caused by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. And now we're building an economy that's even stronger than it was during the Great Big Beautiful Boom. Did anybody hear about the Great Big Beautiful Boom? It's not too long ago. That was my first term. I was president. Look, I'll tell you this — the economy and national security. Very simple. Nobody else will say it. I'll say it. 47% of your income is being taken out. Your taxes are too high. We're going to get them down. You know that, right? They're going to go way down. And we want to keep it strong, but nobody's ever seen anything like it because for 47 years, since 1980, we've been losing our wealth in a big way and now we're taking it back. Now we're taking it back from other countries. Look at what happened with oil prices. That was one thing I didn't think we'd be able to do so fast. But they said it would take five years, six years. Food has come down by 24%, meat, dairy, everything has come down. Housing is coming down. Rents are coming down. Prices on cars are coming down. It's amazing. And if I'm president, we'll make it even better. If we can make it this good in three months, just imagine what we could make it in four years. We'll make it much better. Thank you unknown! This is an incredible crowd. You know, we have to talk about what's happening with the economy and national security. 12 months ago, it was a mess, right? It was a mess. We had the worst inflation in history, energy prices were high as they've ever been, gasoline was through the roof, and now for six months, prices are way down. And I'm proud to say that if you go out and get your car fixed today or buy a new car, you're going to pay less than you paid last year, that's the first time that's happened since 1975. That hasn't happened. That's the first time. So if you want to buy a car, this is the month to do it because if you wait till next month, those numbers will be even better. Inflation is at record lows, gasoline prices are the lowest in decades, energy costs are the lowest in decades. In fact, it was just announced by our great secretary of war, Pete Hegseth, who's doing an incredible job. By the way, he was at West Point and then went into the National Guard and became a general. He also served as commander of American forces in Iraq. He was my campaign manager in 2020 and 2024. He's done a fantastic job. But we cut the price of electricity by 50%, which is the biggest thing since we brought back cheap and plentiful energy from Venezuela. The price of electricity is now half of what it was a short while ago. And remember when it was going up every single day? We got it down 50%. And we did something else. For years, Democrats have talked about forgiving student loans, but they never really wanted to forgive them. They didn't care about you. They cared about getting money into their pockets. So when we put out a plan to forgive student loan debt for people who make $150,000 a year or less, you would think the Democrats would be all over us like crazy. But they weren't. Not one Democrat in Congress supported this, not one. Because they don't represent you. They represent big private colleges and universities and the banks. So we said, "Well, if they're against this, maybe we'll give everyone in the country up to 50 grand." And now everybody's going crazy. If they love free money, they love it. What the hell's wrong with these people? We should have done it to begin with, but they wouldn't let us. But we gave you 50,000. So for 50,000, we forgave. We had to have some

Look, I'll tell you this — the economy and national security. Very simple. Nobody else will say it. I'll say it. 45 years ago, we had a president who was not Republican, who was a Democrat. He came from a very good family in a very wealthy state, New York, and he came from a good family. But they were just people that worked hard and they became successful. They were never successful. And they worked hard to become successful. But nobody ever said that they didn't come from money. They did. But they made their own way with it. He went to Columbia University, got an MBA degree, got into politics, and then he was elected president of the United States. His name is Franklin Delano Roosevelt. And the world has never seen anything like what FDR did. He saved our country and he saved the entire world from a great depression. We were coming out of a great depression. And he really did save the world, but he saved our country. And if there's any word that you could use about him, that would be his first word because he was a Democrat. There's nothing wrong with being a Democrat. It's okay. You can have Democrats. But when they say, "I'm proud to be a Democrat," I always say, "So are you proud to be a communist?" And they don't like me too much for that one, right? So, I'll tell you, he saved the country, he saved the world. And so, let's go back 85 years and look at what happened under the worst president. Worst president. The worst president by far. The best president, as I've been telling you for many months, the best president in history is Abraham Lincoln. And before that, George Washington. And then after that, it goes down for quite a while until we get up again with Ronald Reagan, but no president comes close to Abraham Lincoln. He freed millions of slaves. He ended the Civil War. He saved the union, and he preserved the republic. In fact, I think, above all else, he preserved the republic. That's why I consider him to be the greatest president we've ever had. But after Lincoln, the next greatest president we've ever had, and that's an opinion, but it's my opinion, was Franklin D. Roosevelt. Now, the only president that even comes close, I think, is Ronald Reagan, but there's another one. We'll see how it turns out. There are other ones that I put in the category. Dwight Eisenhower is a guy. They're in the same class as Abraham Lincoln. They

Next question. Yes, you. About trade policy — I'll tell you, nobody knows this better than me. 47 years in business, we're the largest company in the country by far and we've been at war with China for a long time, but they've never had an administration that's taken them on like I'm taking them on. We have tariffs of $300 billion coming down next week. So if they don't settle within a period of two weeks, then the tariffs go up to 450%. But we will make a deal. We'll take them out of our hair. The problem is they were ripping us off for many years. And now I think they're going to pay us back pretty well. We're doing very well against China. I mean, it's really something special. I want to thank President Putin too because he was helping us with the oil prices and I appreciated it very much. It's working out even better than I thought it would work out. They said it couldn't be done. That's why you get smart people like myself running for president, not people that say it can't be done. We did it. We got Russia and China together. I can't believe we got them both. I don't know how good that is politically, but I do appreciate it. Now the problem is we got them, but we need to get them to sign a deal. They'd rather fight than make a deal. In other words, they're really fighters. Look what they've done. They killed 4,000 Americans so far this year, knocked out one of our aircraft carriers, hit Guam. They've hit our military bases all over the place. They put missiles into the heart of our capital, Washington DC, shot down eight planes and we lost many great patriots and heroes. They blew up a plane over Hawaii last night. This is crazy. This is Biden. This is the Democrat party. I love you all. Thank you very much. You may want to get some of those seats behind you. I just found out, I hear you very well. And if you could maybe scoot up some more seats, please?. I have no idea who you are, but I love you. That's right. I love you too. Go ahead, please. Speaker 6 : Mr. President, what do you think about the Iranian nuclear threat and Israel being threatened and what do you think about Iran's missile attack on US forces in Syria today? Donald Trump : Well, I told you yesterday I'm meeting with Bibi tonight. He's going to be here and I look forward

Thank you unknown! This is an incredible crowd. You know, we have to talk about what's happening with the economy and national security. 2 months ago, our country was a mess. Our border was open and uncontrolled, inflation was at record levels, oil prices were through the roof, crime was everywhere. And now we have no border, energy prices are down. We're making America affordable again for everybody in this room and every other person in America. They're all going to be rich soon. We're really bringing them up to where they should be. But we also had to do something about crime. And that's why I terminated the woke district attorney of San Francisco and replaced her with someone who will actually enforce the law. And he has done a great job. He's doing a great job, Jim. Thank you very much. And because of him, last month San Francisco had the lowest murder rate since 1975. Lowest murder rate since 1975. That's good news. Nobody thought that was possible, but it was. Under my administration, violent crime is way down, and the murder rate in our cities is at a 25-year low. It's the lowest number in 25 years. Now, we need to keep that going, so we can't let anybody get into office that won't support that kind of thing. We can't allow that. So last week, I fired a deranged lunatic district attorney in Manhattan named Alvin Bragg. I fired him, and now he's suing me. He's the one suing me. What a jerk. In other words, I didn't fire him. He fired himself. I just said, "You're fired." He filed a lawsuit. Can you believe? The man's crazy as hell. He's got a problem. He's got some serious issues. So instead of protecting the public, he would go after people for minor technical violations. One of his first acts was to end cash bail. He ended cash bail. As a result, more than 1,000 dangerous career criminals were released from jail without any bail whatsoever. More than 1,000. Instead of prosecuting these criminals, he prosecuted those brave heroes of ours who went into the World Trade Center on September 11th. On September 11th, those heroes, like every single one of us in this room, felt the pain of losing family members or friends who were taken away by the terrorists. And when Alvin Bragg refused to prosecute the monsters who perpetrated the worst terrorist attack in American history, I put him out of business. If he doesn't want to do the right thing, then

Next question. Yes, you. About trade policy — I'll tell you, nobody knows this better than me. 47 years ago, we had the greatest economy in history and we were bringing our people back home from overseas where they were trapped by wars. They were trapped by other countries that didn't take care of them and now we're doing it again. We are bringing America back to life. We are bringing America back big and strong and beautiful and fast. We have a lot of things happening right now. We have a good relationship with China. We made a great deal with Japan. We've got everybody wanting to make a deal with us because nobody can do anything without us. And so we have a very strong position with respect to trade. So if you look at a year ago, we had the worst trade deficit ever. Nobody's even close. And now we have the best trade surplus. Nobody has a trade surplus like what we have. The biggest is less than half of what we have. So we have the biggest trade surplus ever. That includes the massive amounts of money pouring into our country in terms of investments and real estate. They want to build their plants here. They want to be in America. And they know that if they don't do it, somebody else will because there's no place like America. But we have the best trade numbers ever, including the fact that we have a tremendous amount of money coming in from foreign nations, including foreign nations where they've taken advantage of us for many decades. Now we're taking advantage of them and they're paying us a lot of money. If we hadn't done that, we'd have been really dead as a nation. Other nations would have blown us away. And now we have the best numbers. But nobody wants to go into business anymore because of the regulations. You see that? When Biden came in, he made it almost impossible to do business. It was the worst thing that could happen. He did it on purpose. He wanted to kill business, but it didn't work out for him too well. But I'm ending all those ridiculous environmental laws that have killed business, and we're allowing our businesses to flourish. And you saw how bad it was. When Biden took over, when he came in, the stock market went down 11 times faster than any time before. In one month, he lost more wealth than any president ever created. We inherited a mess. We inherited a mess. We also have the highest inflation in history. No matter what they say, it's the highest inflation in the history of our country. And if you go back 15 months

Sean, I have to tell you — and nobody wants to talk about this — but the economy and national security. The numbers are incredible. 10 months in a row of growth above 3%. Nobody thought that was possible. We inherited a mess. We've turned it into a dream for everybody. And the best part is, we did it without raising prices on anybody. It's good for everybody. But if you look at the numbers, it's incredible. That's not me saying that. That's people who were very negative against us who now say that Biden's economic policies led to the worst recession since the Great Depression. Look at what they're writing. They said it. It's because of what he caused with all his energy policy, all his green nonsense, which has destroyed our country. It's killed millions of people. It's killed plants. It's killed everything. So there's no doubt about it. Inflation is down. Prices are coming down. Energy prices are way down. Gasoline is way down. Everything's way down. If you see gasoline, you'll pay $1.99. You couldn't even think of paying $1.99 a gallon. Now, as an example, and just so you know, they don't want to admit this either, they don't like talking about it, but the fact is, we're in a lot of wars right now, right? And we're winning them. No president ever won one war, let alone seven or eight wars. We're winning them, and we're bringing people back from the dead. We had a general come home yesterday, brought him back from the dead. He was dead. He got up and said, "Thank you, sir." It was great. He was shot twice. His arm was shot off. He didn't lose any blood. He was bleeding a little bit, but he came through it really well. I mean, he had a hole in the middle of his chest, and he was doing fine. These things happen sometimes. But it's incredible. Think of it. They say that you could never win a war. We're winning every single war. Every single one. And the only reason they're fighting is because their leaders are incompetent, stupid, evil, or they're getting paid to do it by their enemies, meaning China. The whole thing is China. It's unbelievable. What they've done to our country. But we took in $28 billion last month, and we gave out $15 billion, mostly in welfare, social security, et cetera, et cetera. We took in more than we gave out.

Shouting over helicopter noise. On tariffs — it's very simple. We're doing great. 7,000 pages of regulation were cut off the books. I think that's pretty good. Nobody else has ever done that. Nobody else could do that because we have a system where Congress passes bills and then the bureaucrats make up the rules. And if you don't like the rules… That's why we had Obamacare for 11 years, which is terrible. But I terminated it. It was horrible. But for 11 years it wasn't repealed. The Democrats never wanted to repeal it. They just made the people suffer with it. But they never wanted to repeal it because their dream is socialized medicine. Their dream is socialism. And I terminated it. It cost $1 trillion more than any other health care plan in history. It was not affordable health care. It was fake news. I ended it. Now we have better health care at a much lower price. Think of that. Lower prices. I also saved every man, woman and child about $2,400 on healthcare. Nobody did anything even close. I got the best price. I got the lowest price. And when you look at your insurance bill, you'll see numbers way down. Your premiums are way down. And you're going to get better healthcare too, right? Better healthcare. So what does Trump do? He cuts regulations. They come out with one regulation after another. Every day it's a new regulation. And those regulations kill jobs. Regulations cause the high energy prices that we're now bringing down. So by cutting regulations, we're able to bring down the price of energy so that everybody can afford energy. And I'm ending all energy subsidies. There's no more subsidies for oil companies. I'm ending them immediately. They've been paid trillions of dollars already. They're very rich. They're extremely rich. I'm terminating subsidies. Subsidies for electric companies, windmills, solar panels. We're terminating them immediately. No more free rides for the big companies who rip us off. No more free rides. And they've been getting them for a long time. That's why Biden caused this problem. I inherited a mess. I inherited a mess. We have no more green energy mandates. Those green energy mandates were causing electricity rates to go through the roof. I put a stop to that. And I'm stopping these electric car mandates. I don't want electric cars. If you want an electric car, go ahead and buy it. But I want a car where you can open the hood and fix it yourself

Look, I'll tell you this — the economy and national security. Very simple. Nobody else will say it. I'll say it. 10 months ago we had an economy that was dead. It's now coming back. We have a stock market that was at $24,000. Now it's over 49,000. So, what happens is every time there's a little dip, they go crazy. They write articles like, "Oh, it's going down," but it's actually up. And I rebuilt our military because it was really bad. Our country was in serious trouble. We had no military. If you look at my first term, we spent more on defense than any other president by far. But we also took care of people with healthcare. And if you think about it, that's the opposite of what all these Democrats want to do, right? Because they only talk about one thing. The economy has never been mentioned by them. They don't mention it. That's why we won. That's why we won big. And so, we're bringing prices way down. We've brought energy prices way down. And I'm bringing food prices way down. As you know, we're bringing drug prices way down. But we're doing great. We're doing great. We have inflation. Prices are coming down. Inflation's coming down. They said, "Prices are not coming down." No, they are. And they're coming down fast. They came down last month faster than anybody thought possible. But nobody wants to admit it. Nobody wants to admit it. I mean, even some of my friends on the right, they want to see me fail. They want to see me fail. And I said, "Why would you want to see me fail?" I did better the second term than the first term. I was president for four years. First two years, we got everything done. The last two years were really tough. I inherited Biden, who had a rigged election. You saw it. Look, he lost seven states. He lost seven swing states. I won seven swing states. He won Washington DC. He won DC. I won. I won all seven states. And yet, they made him president. And we're paying for that now. We're paying for that now. I'll tell you this, you need somebody that knows how to make deals. I make deals. I didn't get rich making deals. I got rich because I could take a piece of property and build it up. And then when I sold it, I'd sell it at a nice price. But I was a deal maker

We're heading out now. But I want to say — what they are doing is a disgrace. Total disgrace. 25 years, we have no war. We make peace in the Middle East and all over the world. And that's why you don't have war anymore. That's why nobody wants to fight us because they know if they do, they'll lose badly. They're going to lose badly. So we make peace. We made peace with Iran. You saw that. Peace with Afghanistan. We made peace with Pakistan. We made peace with China. We made peace with everybody. Nobody else can make peace. Nobody else even tries. They try, but they can't get it done. Only President Trump makes peace. Now, they've lost their minds. These people are crazy. They've lost their minds. They have gone totally crazy. When you see them, when you hear them talking, they sound like crazy people. Because they think that they can win against the United States of America. They cannot. I hope they don't do this. It would be a shame if they did. But I'm not surprised. I expected it. I was waiting for it. I didn't wait long, but I knew eventually they were going to have to do something. Because our economy is so good. If I wasn't president, they wouldn't have been able to start this thing. Our economy is so strong right now. We're the hottest country anywhere in the world by far. We have the hottest country anywhere in the world. So they're going to do it probably. And as I said before, we'll take care of it very fast. And I think it will be very quick. Very quick. As you see, we have the strongest military ever. We have the best equipment. We have everything. And I think we'll have it taken care of pretty soon. But it's too bad. They started it. They shouldn't have started it. But the only way they could really stop us from making peace is to go and hit us. And they're not going to be able to stand up against us. Nobody is. There's never been anybody that's stood up against us. Nobody. Not even close. No matter how hard they tried. In fact, every time somebody tried, they ended up getting killed. So we're ready to go, and hopefully we won't need to use force. Hopefully, we won't. But if they decide to play, they're going to pay dearly. Thank you very much. Thank you. Shouting over helicopter noise. On tariffs — it's very simple. We're doing great. 100 percent of the people in our country are paying no tax, and we have a big fat beautiful tax cut for everybody. That's why the stock market went up 5,000 points, but we also have to take care of other countries because they don't take care of us. We're not taking care of them. We've been ripped off by every one of them for many years, so we put on tariff. We put on a big tariff. They all agreed that we could do it. Now you tell me what happens when I lower the tariff? What will happen to the stock market? It'll go down. It's as simple as that. It would be horrible for the stock market if we lower the tariff. And this is a Democrat plan, actually, where it was called the Biden Plan. It was a Biden Plan. I said, "I like it." If I did the opposite of the Biden Plan, which I just did, the stock market would go way up, but the Democrats want to raise taxes. They want to raise your electric bill by 300, 400%. They want to raise gasoline prices. We're at $1.99. It used to be $4 or more, and now it's $1.99. They want to raise electricity by 300%. They want to raise everything. So the only thing we can do is we have to stick together. When we stick together, nobody's going to mess with us. And if we stick together, the border's closed, and the borders will never open again. But if we don't stick together, then we won't win the midterms, and then all of these things that happened today won't mean anything. There's no doubt about that. Look at how bad California has done with the Democrats. The Democrats took control. They ruined their whole state. Crime is through the roof. The schools are terrible. Everything is gone. Nobody wants to live there anymore. You see that? I'm sorry, that was my friend, Tim Scott. He didn't get enough votes in the election. He got screwed. He was cheated out of the nomination. He was cheated. If he had gotten the nomination, he would've beaten Kamala. She'd be back in India right now. But we lost him. We lost him to cheating. But he wanted to be president of the United States very badly, and he worked his tail off. But he was cheated. I know what it feels like, but I won twice

Next question. Yes, you. About trade policy — I'll tell you, nobody knows this better than me. 47 years, I've had a lot of experience with tariffs and the impact on the economy. And if we have to use them, we will. We hope that they're unnecessary. They were never intended to be used. I think it's very important for our country, for our people, and for the world. It's more important for the world because we don't want to go through what we went through in the past four years when other countries were ripping us off like no other country ever ripped anybody. If we didn't do anything about it, those days are over. And that includes China, but it also includes everybody else. So we have a good relationship with China right now. As you know, Secretary Lutnick was in there yesterday, as well as others. The first meeting they ever had was today, which is really a big deal, because as you know, President Trump :... last administration got ripped off like never before by anybody in the history of our country. And they did nothing about it. And it's not just China. It's China, Japan, South Korea, Malaysia, Thailand, Vietnam, Indonesia, India, Europe, EU, European Union, Australia, Canada, Mexico, everybody. We're bringing them all back down to earth. We have to bring them back down to earth. That's why they're paying us billions of dollars every year. We wouldn't even be talking about money. We'd be talking about national security. We lost thousands of jobs and millions of jobs were going out of our country, being sent overseas. We're bringing them back here. So we have to do that. We can't let the countries rip us off anymore. So I mean, that's a big part of it. But again, it's never been done before. It's never happened before. So I don't blame them for saying, "Well, geez." Or, "Whoa," or whatever they say. You'd say something too, right? So next question please. Go ahead. Speaker 4 : Thank you. Donald Trump :. Speaker 5 : First of all, thank you so much for taking my question. What would you say to those who say that your policies are too extreme for America, and could you describe how your presidency has impacted your family? Donald Trump : Well, I think we have an extremely loyal base, very loyal base. And I think we have tremendous support from people that aren't necessarily Republicans. In fact, I would say many of them

Hello unknown! What a crowd, what a beautiful crowd. Now, I want to talk about the economy. Nobody talks about this. 12 months ago our country was in the grip of an economic catastrophe. We inherited a mess from Joe Biden and the Democrats. They destroyed energy. Energy prices were the highest ever recorded and they had us on the brink of a recession with the worst inflation in more than 50 years. Inflation drove up grocery prices, rents, housing costs and made everything so much more expensive for hardworking families. That's why we passed the largest tax cuts and biggest regulation cuts in American history. And today we have the strongest growth, lowest inflation and best stock market that we've ever had by far. The stock market is at all-time highs, gasoline prices are at their lowest levels in over a year, mortgage rates are down, and consumer confidence has reached its highest level in more than two years. In other words, after four months of the fake president, prices are coming down and wages are going up like you've never seen before. When I took office, the average new car payment was around $700 a month. Today it's less than $600. In some cases, it's even below $500. If you look back a year ago, a gallon of milk cost $4.25. Today, it's $2.99. A dozen eggs cost $6.29 last year. This year, it's just under $3. And if you go back a few years to 2020, it was just under $1.40. So I guess the good news is it could be worse. A year ago, a loaf of bread cost $5.37, but today it's $3.48. As you know, for decades our country has been losing our wealth to foreign nations and that's no longer happening. For the first time in many, many decades, America is leading China in total value of all companies. Our country's valuation is now higher than China's by almost 20%. In addition, we're leading Japan, Germany, India, France, Brazil, Australia, Canada, South Korea and others. We've turned things around pretty fast, right? One reason is because of tariffs which we imposed on countries that rip off our country. Tariffs are bringing hundreds of billions of dollars into our treasury. And instead of being ripped off as we were for many years, we're now respected again all over the world. Under the previous administration, we lost trillions of dollars to countries like China, Japan, and European nations who stole our jobs and exploited our people. They sent their factories to places like

This is a big day. A very big day for unknown. Because we are going to talk about making America great again. 11 months ago, our country was in ruins. We had the worst inflation of any major nation in history. The economy was a mess. The stock market was crashing. Our borders were open and unenforceable. We were at war with the world. But now that's all changed. And we have the hottest country anywhere in the world. That's why I've just been honored by Forbes magazine as the most powerful person on Earth. That's right. And I'm thankful to be joined today by so many people who helped make this happen. You know who you are. And I want to thank my wife, Melania. She's really been incredible. Thank you, honey. Thank you. And thanks to everybody here today. It's great to see so many friends. Boy, it's an honor. So if you look back one year ago, we inherited a mess. The Biden administration left us with the worst economy since the Great Depression. They had the worst inflation in 50 years. The worst prices in housing in 40 years. The highest energy prices ever. The lowest investment levels ever recorded. And they created the biggest trade deficit in American history. Think of that. They gave away trillions of dollars in illegal handouts to foreign countries, to foreign countries. The largest cash transfers in world history, but not to our friends or allies, but to our enemies like Iran and China. Nobody's ever seen anything like it. And they also allowed the border to go completely out of control. With their failed open-border policy, they let millions of foreign criminals into our country. Foreign criminals. These were drug dealers, murderers, child rapists, gang members, mentally insane individuals. And yet, despite this disaster, Democrats did nothing. For four long years, Democrats sat on the sidelines, they did nothing while our country went down the tubes. And after all that, when Joe Biden lost his bid for reelection, he declared the election "stolen." Yeah, stolen. Can you believe it? It was rigged, rigged against him. He said it wasn't even close. He said, "I got more votes than anybody." Really? Did you hear that? He got more votes than anybody. Well, then why'd you lose? What does that tell you? And he blamed everyone else for his failures. He blamed Republicans, he blamed me. But he never once took responsibility for what happened under his watch. Then he proceeded to sue every state in the union to try and overturn the results of the election.

We love unknown. We love the people of unknown. And we are going to win so big. Let me tell you about the economy and national security. 2 years ago, we inherited a disaster from the Biden administration that caused America's energy prices to skyrocket by 60%. In just one year, Joe Biden caused our electricity prices to increase by 50%, gasoline prices by 57% and home heating oil prices by an unbelievable 109%. But in less than one year, we've slashed those numbers in half and they're coming down fast. Now your energy bills will be much lower and this is on top of everything else. So now we have it all. With the largest tax cuts in American history, we put more money into the pockets of families like never before. And with no inflation for the first time in 48 years, it's called no inflation for 48 years, we restored the promise of prosperity. For decades, politicians promised that America would make energy cheap again. They lied to us. They said they were going to do it, but they didn't know how to get it done.
